```json
    "content": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { useNavigate, Link, useParams } from 'react-router-dom';\nimport { \n  useCreateTeacherMutation, \n  useTeacherDetailQuery, \n  useUpdateTeacherMutation \n} from '../../features/teacher/hooks/useTeacherQueries';\nimport { useBranchesQuery } from '../../features/core/hooks/useBranchQueries';\nimport { useCoursesQuery } from '../../features/course/hooks/useCourseQueries';\n\n// V2 Components\nimport FormSection from '../../components/ui/v2/FormSection';\nimport FormField from '../../components/ui/v2/FormField';\nimport TextInput from '../../components/ui/v2/TextInput';\nimport SelectInput from '../../components/ui/v2/SelectInput';\nimport DateInput from '../../components/ui/v2/DateInput';\nimport PhoneInput from '../../components/ui/v2/PhoneInput';\nimport MultiSelect from '../../components/ui/v2/MultiSelect';\nimport FileUpload from '../../components/ui/v2/FileUpload';\nimport RadioGroup from '../../components/ui/v2/RadioGroup';\nimport ToggleSwitch from '../../components/ui/v2/ToggleSwitch';\nimport PasswordInput from '../../components/ui/v2/PasswordInput';\nimport SegmentedControl from '../../components/ui/v2/SegmentedControl';\nimport CourseSelectionModal from '../../features/course/components/CourseSelectionModal';\n\n/**\n * TeacherForm Page: Handles both New Registration and Profile Editing.\n * Fully synchronized with Teacher schema (Teacher_name -> full_name, mobile -> mobile_number, etc).\n */\nconst AddTeacher = () => {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const isEditMode = !!id;\n  const [isCourseModalOpen, setIsCourseModalOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  // Utility to generate a random password\n  const generatePassword = () => {\n    const chars = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789!@#$%^&*';\n    return Array.from({ length: 10 }, () => chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length)]).join('');\n  };\n\n  // Mutations & Queries\n  const addMutation = useCreateTeacherMutation();\n  const updateMutation = useUpdateTeacherMutation();\n  const { data: existingTeacher, isLoading: isFetchingTeacher } = useTeacherDetailQuery(id);\n\n  // Dynamic Options\n  const { data: coursesData, isLoading: isCoursesLoading } = useCoursesQuery();\n  const { data: branchesData, isLoading: isBranchesLoading } = useBranchesQuery();\n\n  const branchOptions = branchesData?.map(branch => ({\n    label: branch.branch_name,\n    value: branch.branch_name\n  })) || [];\n\n  const [error, setError] = useState(null);\n  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({\n    // Basic Info\n    full_name: '',\n    mobile_number: '',\n    email: '',\n    gender: 'male',\n    date_of_birth: '',\n    address: '',\n    profile_photo_url: '',\n    \n    // Professional Details\n    subjects: [], \n    experience_years: '',\n    qualification: '',\n    specialization: '',\n    previous_institute: '',\n    \n    // Assignment\n    branch: '',\n    teacher_type: 'full_time',\n    joining_date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],\n    time_slots: ['Morning'],\n    \n    // Financials\n    salary_type: 'Monthly', \n    base_salary: '',\n    \n    // Account\n    createLogin: false,\n    username: '',\n    password: generatePassword(),\n    role: 'Teacher',\n    \n    // Status\n    status: 'active',\n    internal_notes: ''\n  });\n\n  const selectedCourseObjects = React.useMemo(() => {\n    if (!coursesData || !formData.subjects) return [];\n    return coursesData.filter(c => formData.subjects.includes(c.course_id));\n  }, [coursesData, formData.subjects]);\n\n  // Sync existing teacher data into form\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (isEditMode && existingTeacher) {\n      const meta = existingTeacher.metadata || {};\n      setFormData({\n        full_name: existingTeacher.full_name || '',\n        mobile_number: existingTeacher.mobile_number || '',\n        email: existingTeacher.email || '',\n        gender: existingTeacher.gender || 'male',\n        date_of_birth: existingTeacher.date_of_birth || '',\n        address: meta.address || '',\n        profile_photo_url: existingTeacher.profile_photo_url || '',\n        \n        subjects: existingTeacher.subject_code ? existingTeacher.subject_code.split(', ').filter(Boolean) : [],\n        experience_years: existingTeacher.experience_years || '',\n        qualification: existingTeacher.qualification || '',\n        specialization: existingTeacher.specialization || '',\n        previous_institute: existingTeacher.previous_institute || '',\n        \n        branch: meta.branch || '',\n        teacher_type: existingTeacher.teacher_type || 'full_time',\n        joining_date: existingTeacher.joining_date || '',\n        time_slots: meta.time_slots || ['Morning'],\n        \n        salary_type: meta.salary_type || 'Monthly',\n        base_salary: meta.base_salary || '',\n        \n        createLogin: false,\n        username: existingTeacher.username || '',\n        password: '••••••••',\n        role: 'Teacher',\n        \n        status: existingTeacher.status || 'active',\n        internal_notes: existingTeacher.notes || ''\n      });\n    }\n  }, [isEditMode, existingTeacher]);\n\n  const handleChange = (name, value) => {\n    setFormData(prev => ({\n      ...prev,\n      [name]: value\n    }));\n  };\n\n  const validateForm = () => {\n    if (!formData.full_name.trim()) return \"Full Name is required.\";\n    if (!formData.mobile_number.trim()) return \"Mobile Number is required.\";\n    if (!formData.branch) return \"Assigned Branch is required.\";\n    if (!formData.experience_years) return \"Experience is required.\";\n    if (!formData.joining_date) return \"Joining Date is required.\";\n    \n    if (formData.email && !/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(formData.email)) {\n      return \"Invalid email format.\";\n    }\n\n    if (formData.createLogin && !formData.username.trim()) {\n      return \"Username is required when 'Create Login' is enabled.\";\n    }\n\n    return null;\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = (e) => {\n    if (e) e.preventDefault();\n    setError(null);\n\n    const validationError = validateForm();\n    if (validationError) {\n      setError(validationError);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Prepare profileData strictly according to Schema\n    const profileData = {\n      full_name: formData.full_name,\n      mobile_number: formData.mobile_number,\n      email: formData.email,\n      gender: formData.gender,\n      date_of_birth: formData.date_of_birth,\n      profile_photo_url: formData.profile_photo_url,\n      experience_years: parseInt(formData.experience_years, 10) || 0,\n      qualification: formData.qualification,\n      specialization: formData.specialization,\n      previous_institute: formData.previous_institute,\n      teacher_type: formData.teacher_type,\n      joining_date: formData.joining_date,\n      status: formData.status,\n      notes: formData.internal_notes,\n      subject_code: formData.subjects.join(', '),\n      metadata: {\n        address: formData.address,\n        branch: formData.branch,\n        time_slots: formData.time_slots,\n        salary_type: formData.salary_type,\n        base_salary: parseFloat(formData.base_salary) || 0,\n        subjects: formData.subjects // Store array in metadata for easier retrieval\n      }\n    };\n\n    if (isEditMode) {\n      updateMutation.mutate({ id, data: profileData }, {\n        onSuccess: (res) => {\n          if (res.success) navigate(`/admin/teachers/${id}`);\n          else setError(res.message || 'Failed to update profile.');\n        },\n        onError: (err) => setError(err.message)\n      });\n    } else {\n      const userData = {\n        username: formData.username || formData.full_name.toLowerCase().replace(/\\s+/g, '_'),\n        password: formData.password,\n        email: formData.email\n      };\n\n      addMutation.mutate({ userData, profileData }, {\n        onSuccess: (res) => {\n          if (res.success) navigate('/admin/teachers');\n          else setError(res.message || 'Failed to register faculty.');\n        },\n        onError: (err) => setError(err.message)\n      });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleCoursesSelect = (selectedObjects) => {\n    const identifiers = selectedObjects.map(c => c.course_id);\n    handleChange('subjects', identifiers);\n  };\n\n  if (isEditMode && isFetchingTeacher) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center min-h-[400px]\">\n        <div className=\"size-12 border-4 border-primary/30 border-t-primary rounded-full animate-spin\"></div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"pb-32\">\n      <CourseSelectionModal \n        isOpen={isCourseModalOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsCourseModalOpen(false)}\n        onSelect={handleCoursesSelect}\n        selectedCourses={selectedCourseObjects}\n        availableCourses={coursesData || []}\n      />\n      {/* Top Header Section */}\n      <header className=\"mb-8 flex justify-between items-end px-4 lg:px-0\">\n        <div>\n          <nav className=\"flex text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary mb-2 gap-2 items-center\">\n            <Link to=\"/admin\" className=\"hover:text-primary transition-colors\">Management</Link>\n            <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-[12px]\">chevron_right</span>\n            <Link to=\"/admin/teachers\" className=\"hover:text-primary transition-colors\">Teachers</Link>\n            <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-[12px]\">chevron_right</span>\n            <span className=\"text-primary font-bold\">{isEditMode ? 'Edit Profile' : 'New Registration'}</span>\n          </nav>\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-text-main dark:text-white\">\n            {isEditMode ? 'Edit Faculty Profile' : 'Teacher Registration'}\n          </h1>\n          <p className=\"text-text-secondary mt-1 font-medium text-sm\">\n            {isEditMode ? `Updating information for ${formData.full_name}` : 'Onboard a new faculty member to the Meridian ecosystem.'}\n          </p>\n        </div>\n        \n        <div className=\"hidden md:flex items-center bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm\">\n          <span className=\"text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase mr-4 tracking-widest\">\n            {isEditMode ? 'Profile Integrity' : 'Progress'}\n          </span>\n          <div className=\"w-32 h-2 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden\">\n            <div className=\"bg-primary w-3/4 h-full\"></div>\n          </div>\n          <span className=\"ml-4 text-xs font-bold text-primary\">{isEditMode ? '100%' : '25%'}</span>\n        </div>\n      </header>\n\n      {error && (\n        <div className=\"mx-4 lg:mx-0 mb-6 bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/20 text-red-600 p-4 rounded-lg border border-red-100 dark:border-red-800 flex items-center gap-3 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-2\">\n          <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined\">error</span>\n          <span className=\"text-sm font-bold\">{error}</span>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <form className=\"space-y-6 px-4 lg:px-0\" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>\n        {/* Section 1 & 2: Grid Layout */}\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6\">\n          {/* 1. Basic Information */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Basic Information\" icon=\"badge\">\n            <FormField label=\"Full Name\" name=\"full_name\" required className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.full_name} \n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('full_name', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"e.g. Dr. Jonathan Smith\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Mobile Number\" name=\"mobile_number\" required className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <PhoneInput \n                value={formData.mobile_number}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('mobile_number', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"000 000 0000\"\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Email Address\" name=\"email\">\n              <TextInput \n                type=\"email\"\n                value={formData.email}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('email', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"jonathan@meridian.com\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Gender\" name=\"gender\">\n              <SelectInput \n                value={formData.gender}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('gender', val)}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Male', value: 'male' },\n                  { label: 'Female', value: 'female' },\n                  { label: 'Other', value: 'other' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Date of Birth\" name=\"date_of_birth\">\n              <DateInput \n                value={formData.date_of_birth}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('date_of_birth', e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Residential Address\" name=\"address\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.address} \n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('address', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"Full residential address...\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Profile Photo\" name=\"avatar\">\n              <FileUpload \n                accept=\"image/*\"\n                helperText=\"Drag & drop image\"\n                onFileSelect={(file) => handleChange('profile_photo_url', file.name)}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n          </FormSection>\n\n          {/* 2. Professional Details */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Professional Details\" icon=\"history_edu\">\n            <FormField label=\"Subjects/Courses\" name=\"subjects\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n                <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2 min-h-[42px] p-2 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700\">\n                  {selectedCourseObjects.length > 0 ? (\n                    selectedCourseObjects.map((course) => (\n                      <div \n                        key={course.course_id}\n                        className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 bg-primary/10 text-primary rounded-lg border border-primary/20 text-[11px] font-bold\"\n                      >\n                        {course.name}\n                        <button \n                          type=\"button\"\n                          onClick={() => handleChange('subjects', formData.subjects.filter(s => s !== course.course_id))}\n                          className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm hover:text-red-500 transition-colors\"\n                        >\n                          close\n                        </button>\n                      </div>\n                    ))\n                  ) : (\n                    <span className=\"text-xs text-slate-400 italic flex items-center px-2\">No courses selected</span>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <button\n                  type=\"button\"\n                  onClick={() => setIsCourseModalOpen(true)}\n                  className=\"w-full py-2.5 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 border-2 border-dashed border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 hover:border-primary hover:text-primary transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2\"\n                >\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-lg\">add_circle</span>\n                  Select Subjects / Courses\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Experience (Years)\" name=\"experience_years\">\n              <TextInput \n                type=\"number\"\n                value={formData.experience_years}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('experience_years', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"0\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Qualification\" name=\"qualification\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.qualification}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('qualification', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"e.g. PhD in Physics\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Specialization\" name=\"specialization\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.specialization}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('specialization', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"Quantum Mechanics\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Previous Institute\" name=\"previous_institute\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.previous_institute}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('previous_institute', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"Metropolis Academic Center\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n          </FormSection>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 3. Assignment & 4. Salary Configuration */}\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6\">\n          {/* 3. Assignment Details */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Assignment Details\" icon=\"assignment_ind\">\n            <FormField label=\"Assigned Branch\" name=\"branch\">\n              <SelectInput \n                value={formData.branch}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('branch', val)}\n                options={isBranchesLoading ? [{ label: 'Loading...', value: '' }] : branchOptions}\n                disabled={isBranchesLoading}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Teacher Type\" name=\"teacher_type\">\n              <SelectInput \n                value={formData.teacher_type}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('teacher_type', val)}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Full-Time', value: 'full_time' },\n                  { label: 'Part-Time', value: 'part_time' },\n                  { label: 'Guest Faculty', value: 'guest' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Joining Date\" name=\"joining_date\">\n              <DateInput \n                value={formData.joining_date}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('joining_date', e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <div className=\"col-span-2 border-t border-border-light dark:border-border-dark pt-4 mt-2\">\n              <SegmentedControl \n                label=\"Preferred Time Slot\"\n                value={Array.isArray(formData.time_slots) ? formData.time_slots[0] : formData.time_slots}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('time_slots', [val])}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Morning', value: 'Morning', icon: 'wb_sunny' },\n                  { label: 'Afternoon', value: 'Afternoon', icon: 'light_mode' },\n                  { label: 'Evening', value: 'Evening', icon: 'dark_mode' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </div>\n          </FormSection>\n\n          {/* 4. Salary Configuration */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Salary Configuration\" icon=\"payments\">\n            <RadioGroup \n              label=\"Salary Type\"\n              name=\"salary_type\"\n              className=\"col-span-2\"\n              value={formData.salary_type}\n              onChange={(val) => handleChange('salary_type', val)}\n              options={[\n                { label: 'Monthly', value: 'Monthly', icon: 'calendar_month' },\n                { label: 'Per Class', value: 'Per Class', icon: 'school' }\n              ]}\n            />\n\n            <FormField label=\"Base Salary / Rate ($)\" name=\"base_salary\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <div className=\"relative\">\n                <span className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400 font-bold\">$</span>\n                <TextInput \n                  type=\"number\"\n                  value={formData.base_salary}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleChange('base_salary', e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"pl-8\"\n                  placeholder=\"5,000\" \n                />\n              </div>\n              <p className=\"text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-2 italic\">Standard corporate deductions will be applied automatically during payroll.</p>\n            </FormField>\n          </FormSection>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 5. Documents & 6. Account Setup */}\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6\">\n          {/* 5. Documents */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Documents\" icon=\"description\">\n            <div className=\"col-span-2 flex flex-col gap-4\">\n              <div className=\"flex items-center p-4 bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                  <h4 className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-text-main dark:text-white\">ID Proof</h4>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500\">Passport, Driving License or State ID</p>\n                </div>\n                <button type=\"button\" className=\"flex items-center gap-2 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark shadow-sm text-xs font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors dark:text-white\">\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm\">upload</span>\n                  Upload\n                </button>\n              </div>\n              <div className=\"flex items-center p-4 bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                  <h4 className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-text-main dark:text-white\">Updated Resume</h4>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500\">PDF or DOCX max 5MB</p>\n                </div>\n                <button type=\"button\" className=\"flex items-center gap-2 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark shadow-sm text-xs font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors dark:text-white\">\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm\">upload</span>\n                  Upload\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </FormSection>\n\n          {/* 6. Account Setup */}\n          <FormSection \n            title=\"Account Setup\" \n            icon=\"lock_open\"\n            headerAction={\n              <ToggleSwitch \n                label=\"Create Login\" \n                checked={formData.createLogin}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('createLogin', val)}\n                disabled={isEditMode}\n              />\n            }\n          >\n            <div className={`col-span-2 grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 transition-all duration-300 ${formData.createLogin || isEditMode ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-30 pointer-events-none'}`}>\n              <FormField label=\"Username\" name=\"username\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n                <TextInput \n                  value={formData.username}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleChange('username', e.target.value)}\n                  placeholder=\"jsmith_meridian\"\n                  disabled={isEditMode}\n                />\n              </FormField>\n              \n              <FormField label={isEditMode ? \"Password (Encrypted)\" : \"Generated Password\"} name=\"password\">\n                <div className=\"flex items-center p-2.5 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark justify-between h-[42px]\">\n                  <span className=\"text-sm font-mono text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400\">\n                    {isEditMode ? '••••••••' : formData.password}\n                  </span>\n                  {!isEditMode && (\n                    <button \n                      type=\"button\" \n                      onClick={() => handleChange('password', generatePassword())}\n                      className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-lg hover:rotate-180 transition-transform duration-300\"\n                    >\n                      refresh\n                    </button>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n              </FormField>\n\n              <FormField label=\"System Role\" name=\"role\">\n                <div className=\"h-[42px] bg-primary/5 rounded-lg border border-primary/20 text-sm font-semibold text-primary flex items-center justify-center gap-2\">\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm\">verified_user</span>\n                  Teacher\n                </div>\n              </FormField>\n            </div>\n          </FormSection>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 7. Status & Notes */}\n        <FormSection title=\"Status & Internal Notes\" icon=\"notes\">\n          <div className=\"col-span-3 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6\">\n            <div className=\"md:col-span-1\">\n              <RadioGroup \n                label=\"Onboarding Status\"\n                name=\"status\"\n                layout=\"list\"\n                value={formData.status}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('status', val)}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Active', value: 'active' },\n                  { label: 'Inactive', value: 'inactive' },\n                  { label: 'Pending', value: 'pending' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"md:col-span-2\">\n              <FormField label=\"Internal Notes\" name=\"internal_notes\">\n                <textarea \n                  name=\"internal_notes\"\n                  value={formData.internal_notes}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleChange('internal_notes', e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary text-sm p-3 outline-none min-h-[160px] resize-none dark:text-white transition-all\"\n                  placeholder=\"Add any background checks, interview feedback, or special requests here...\"\n                ></textarea>\n              </FormField>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </FormSection>\n      </form>\n\n      {/* Sticky Bottom Action Bar */}\n      <footer className=\"fixed bottom-0 right-0 w-full md:w-[calc(100%-16rem)] border-t z-50 bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-lg px-8 py-4 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4\">\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => navigate(isEditMode ? `/admin/teachers/${id}` : '/admin/teachers')}\n            className=\"text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-900 font-medium text-sm flex items-center gap-2 transition-colors\"\n          >\n            <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-lg\">close</span>\n            {isEditMode ? 'Discard Changes' : 'Cancel Registration'}\n          </button>\n          <div className=\"hidden md:block h-4 w-[1px] bg-slate-200\"></div>\n          <p className=\"hidden md:block text-[11px] text-slate-400 font-medium italic\">Changes are not saved automatically.</p>\n        </div>\n        \n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 w-full md:w-auto\">\n          {!isEditMode && (\n            <button type=\"button\" className=\"hidden lg:block px-5 py-2.5 rounded-lg border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 transition-colors font-semibold text-sm\">\n              Save & Create Another\n            </button>\n          )}\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={handleSubmit}\n            disabled={addMutation.isPending || updateMutation.isPending}\n            className=\"flex-1 md:flex-none px-8 py-2.5 rounded-lg bg-primary text-white hover:bg-blue-700 transition-all font-bold text-sm shadow-md shadow-primary/20 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 active:scale-95 disabled:opacity-70\"\n          >\n            {addMutation.isPending || updateMutation.isPending ? 'Saving...' : isEditMode ? 'Update Profile' : 'Complete Registration'}\n            <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-lg\">arrow_forward</span>\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </footer>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nexport default AddTeacher;",
    "ai_proposed_content": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { useNavigate, Link, useParams } from 'react-router-dom';\nimport { \n  useCreateTeacherMutation, \n  useTeacherDetailQuery, \n  useUpdateTeacherMutation \n} from '../../features/teacher/hooks/useTeacherQueries';\nimport { useBranchesQuery } from '../../features/core/hooks/useBranchQueries';\nimport { useCoursesQuery } from '../../features/course/hooks/useCourseQueries';\n\n// V2 Components\nimport FormSection from '../../components/ui/v2/FormSection';\nimport FormField from '../../components/ui/v2/FormField';\nimport TextInput from '../../components/ui/v2/TextInput';\nimport SelectInput from '../../components/ui/v2/SelectInput';\nimport DateInput from '../../components/ui/v2/DateInput';\nimport PhoneInput from '../../components/ui/v2/PhoneInput';\nimport MultiSelect from '../../components/ui/v2/MultiSelect';\nimport FileUpload from '../../components/ui/v2/FileUpload';\nimport RadioGroup from '../../components/ui/v2/RadioGroup';\nimport ToggleSwitch from '../../components/ui/v2/ToggleSwitch';\nimport PasswordInput from '../../components/ui/v2/PasswordInput';\nimport SegmentedControl from '../../components/ui/v2/SegmentedControl';\nimport CourseSelectionModal from '../../features/course/components/CourseSelectionModal';\n\n/**\n * TeacherForm Page: Handles both New Registration and Profile Editing.\n * Fully synchronized with Teacher schema (Teacher_name -> full_name, mobile -> mobile_number, etc).\n */\nconst AddTeacher = () => {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const isEditMode = !!id;\n  const [isCourseModalOpen, setIsCourseModalOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  // Utility to generate a random password\n  const generatePassword = () => {\n    const chars = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789!@#$%^&*';\n    return Array.from({ length: 10 }, () => chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length)]).join('');\n  };\n\n  // Mutations & Queries\n  const addMutation = useCreateTeacherMutation();\n  const updateMutation = useUpdateTeacherMutation();\n  const { data: existingTeacher, isLoading: isFetchingTeacher } = useTeacherDetailQuery(id);\n\n  // Dynamic Options\n  const { data: coursesData, isLoading: isCoursesLoading } = useCoursesQuery();\n  const { data: branchesData, isLoading: isBranchesLoading } = useBranchesQuery();\n\n  const branchOptions = branchesData?.map(branch => ({\n    label: branch.branch_name,\n    value: branch.branch_name\n  })) || [];\n\n  const [error, setError] = useState(null);\n  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({\n    // Basic Info\n    full_name: '',\n    mobile_number: '',\n    email: '',\n    gender: 'male',\n    date_of_birth: '',\n    address: '',\n    profile_photo_url: '',\n    \n    // Professional Details\n    subjects: [], \n    experience_years: '',\n    qualification: '',\n    specialization: '',\n    previous_institute: '',\n    \n    // Assignment\n    branch: '',\n    teacher_type: 'full_time',\n    joining_date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],\n    time_slots: ['Morning'],\n    \n    // Financials\n    salary_type: 'Monthly', \n    base_salary: '',\n    \n    // Account\n    createLogin: false,\n    username: '',\n    password: generatePassword(),\n    role: 'Teacher',\n    \n    // Status\n    status: 'active',\n    internal_notes: ''\n  });\n\n  const selectedCourseObjects = React.useMemo(() => {\n    if (!coursesData || !formData.subjects) return [];\n    return coursesData.filter(c => formData.subjects.includes(c.course_id));\n  }, [coursesData, formData.subjects]);\n\n  // Sync existing teacher data into form\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (isEditMode && existingTeacher) {\n      const meta = existingTeacher.metadata || {};\n      setFormData({\n        full_name: existingTeacher.full_name || '',\n        mobile_number: existingTeacher.mobile_number || '',\n        email: existingTeacher.email || '',\n        gender: existingTeacher.gender || 'male',\n        date_of_birth: existingTeacher.date_of_birth || '',\n        address: meta.address || '',\n        profile_photo_url: existingTeacher.profile_photo_url || '',\n        \n        subjects: existingTeacher.subject_code ? existingTeacher.subject_code.split(', ').filter(Boolean) : [],\n        experience_years: existingTeacher.experience_years || '',\n        qualification: existingTeacher.qualification || '',\n        specialization: existingTeacher.specialization || '',\n        previous_institute: existingTeacher.previous_institute || '',\n        \n        branch: meta.branch || '',\n        teacher_type: existingTeacher.teacher_type || 'full_time',\n        joining_date: existingTeacher.joining_date || '',\n        time_slots: meta.time_slots || ['Morning'],\n        \n        salary_type: meta.salary_type || 'Monthly',\n        base_salary: meta.base_salary || '',\n        \n        createLogin: false,\n        username: existingTeacher.username || '',\n        password: '••••••••',\n        role: 'Teacher',\n        \n        status: existingTeacher.status || 'active',\n        internal_notes: existingTeacher.notes || ''\n      });\n    }\n  }, [isEditMode, existingTeacher]);\n\n  const handleChange = (name, value) => {\n    setFormData(prev => ({\n      ...prev,\n      [name]: value\n    }));\n  };\n\n  const validateForm = () => {\n    if (!formData.full_name.trim()) return \"Full Name is required.\";\n    if (!formData.mobile_number.trim()) return \"Mobile Number is required.\";\n    if (!formData.branch) return \"Assigned Branch is required.\";\n    if (!formData.experience_years) return \"Experience is required.\";\n    if (!formData.joining_date) return \"Joining Date is required.\";\n    \n    if (formData.email && !/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(formData.email)) {\n      return \"Invalid email format.\";\n    }\n\n    if (formData.createLogin && !formData.username.trim()) {\n      return \"Username is required when 'Create Login' is enabled.\";\n    }\n\n    return null;\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = (e) => {\n    if (e) e.preventDefault();\n    setError(null);\n\n    const validationError = validateForm();\n    if (validationError) {\n      setError(validationError);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Prepare profileData strictly according to Schema\n    const profileData = {\n      full_name: formData.full_name,\n      mobile_number: formData.mobile_number,\n      email: formData.email,\n      gender: formData.gender,\n      date_of_birth: formData.date_of_birth,\n      profile_photo_url: formData.profile_photo_url,\n      experience_years: parseInt(formData.experience_years, 10) || 0,\n      qualification: formData.qualification,\n      specialization: formData.specialization,\n      previous_institute: formData.previous_institute,\n      teacher_type: formData.teacher_type,\n      joining_date: formData.joining_date,\n      status: formData.status,\n      notes: formData.internal_notes,\n      subject_code: formData.subjects.join(', '),\n      metadata: {\n        address: formData.address,\n        branch: formData.branch,\n        time_slots: formData.time_slots,\n        salary_type: formData.salary_type,\n        base_salary: parseFloat(formData.base_salary) || 0,\n        subjects: formData.subjects // Store array in metadata for easier retrieval\n      }\n    };\n\n    if (isEditMode) {\n      updateMutation.mutate({ id, data: profileData }, {\n        onSuccess: (res) => {\n          if (res.success) navigate(`/admin/teachers/${id}`);\n          else setError(res.message || 'Failed to update profile.');\n        },\n        onError: (err) => setError(err.message)\n      });\n    } else {\n      const userData = {\n        username: formData.username || formData.full_name.toLowerCase().replace(/\\s+/g, '_'),\n        password: formData.password,\n        email: formData.email\n      };\n\n      addMutation.mutate({ userData, profileData }, {\n        onSuccess: (res) => {\n          if (res.success) navigate('/admin/teachers');\n          else setError(res.message || 'Failed to register faculty.');\n        },\n        onError: (err) => setError(err.message)\n      });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleCoursesSelect = (selectedObjects) => {\n    const identifiers = selectedObjects.map(c => c.course_id);\n    handleChange('subjects', identifiers);\n  };\n\n  if (isEditMode && isFetchingTeacher) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center min-h-[400px]\">\n        <div className=\"size-12 border-4 border-primary/30 border-t-primary rounded-full animate-spin\"></div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"pb-32\">\n      <CourseSelectionModal \n        isOpen={isCourseModalOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsCourseModalOpen(false)}\n        onSelect={handleCoursesSelect}\n        selectedCourses={selectedCourseObjects}\n        availableCourses={coursesData || []}\n      />\n      {/* Top Header Section */}\n      <header className=\"mb-8 flex justify-between items-end px-4 lg:px-0\">\n        <div>\n          <nav className=\"flex text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary mb-2 gap-2 items-center\">\n            <Link to=\"/admin\" className=\"hover:text-primary transition-colors\">Management</Link>\n            <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-[12px]\">chevron_right</span>\n            <Link to=\"/admin/teachers\" className=\"hover:text-primary transition-colors\">Teachers</Link>\n            <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-[12px]\">chevron_right</span>\n            <span className=\"text-primary font-bold\">{isEditMode ? 'Edit Profile' : 'New Registration'}</span>\n          </nav>\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-text-main dark:text-white\">\n            {isEditMode ? 'Edit Faculty Profile' : 'Teacher Registration'}\n          </h1>\n          <p className=\"text-text-secondary mt-1 font-medium text-sm\">\n            {isEditMode ? `Updating information for ${formData.full_name}` : 'Onboard a new faculty member to the Meridian ecosystem.'}\n          </p>\n        </div>\n        \n        <div className=\"hidden md:flex items-center bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm\">\n          <span className=\"text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase mr-4 tracking-widest\">\n            {isEditMode ? 'Profile Integrity' : 'Progress'}\n          </span>\n          <div className=\"w-32 h-2 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden\">\n            <div className=\"bg-primary w-3/4 h-full\"></div>\n          </div>\n          <span className=\"ml-4 text-xs font-bold text-primary\">{isEditMode ? '100%' : '25%'}</span>\n        </div>\n      </header>\n\n      {error && (\n        <div className=\"mx-4 lg:mx-0 mb-6 bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/20 text-red-600 p-4 rounded-lg border border-red-100 dark:border-red-800 flex items-center gap-3 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-2\">\n          <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined\">error</span>\n          <span className=\"text-sm font-bold\">{error}</span>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <form className=\"space-y-6 px-4 lg:px-0\" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>\n        {/* Section 1 & 2: Grid Layout */}\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6\">\n          {/* 1. Basic Information */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Basic Information\" icon=\"badge\">\n            <FormField label=\"Full Name\" name=\"full_name\" required className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.full_name} \n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('full_name', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"e.g. Dr. Jonathan Smith\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Mobile Number\" name=\"mobile_number\" required className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <PhoneInput \n                value={formData.mobile_number}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('mobile_number', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"000 000 0000\"\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Email Address\" name=\"email\">\n              <TextInput \n                type=\"email\"\n                value={formData.email}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('email', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"jonathan@meridian.com\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Gender\" name=\"gender\">\n              <SelectInput \n                value={formData.gender}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('gender', val)}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Male', value: 'male' },\n                  { label: 'Female', value: 'female' },\n                  { label: 'Other', value: 'other' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Date of Birth\" name=\"date_of_birth\">\n              <DateInput \n                value={formData.date_of_birth}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('date_of_birth', e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Residential Address\" name=\"address\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.address} \n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('address', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"Full residential address...\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Profile Photo\" name=\"avatar\">\n              <FileUpload \n                accept=\"image/*\"\n                helperText=\"Drag & drop image\"\n                onFileSelect={(file) => handleChange('profile_photo_url', file.name)}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n          </FormSection>\n\n          {/* 2. Professional Details */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Professional Details\" icon=\"history_edu\">\n            <FormField label=\"Subjects/Courses\" name=\"subjects\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n                <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2 min-h-[42px] p-2 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700\">\n                  {selectedCourseObjects.length > 0 ? (\n                    selectedCourseObjects.map((course) => (\n                      <div \n                        key={course.course_id}\n                        className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 bg-primary/10 text-primary rounded-lg border border-primary/20 text-[11px] font-bold\"\n                      >\n                        {course.name}\n                        <button \n                          type=\"button\"\n                          onClick={() => handleChange('subjects', formData.subjects.filter(s => s !== course.course_id))}\n                          className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm hover:text-red-500 transition-colors\"\n                        >\n                          close\n                        </button>\n                      </div>\n                    ))\n                  ) : (\n                    <span className=\"text-xs text-slate-400 italic flex items-center px-2\">No courses selected</span>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <button\n                  type=\"button\"\n                  onClick={() => setIsCourseModalOpen(true)}\n                  className=\"w-full py-2.5 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 border-2 border-dashed border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 hover:border-primary hover:text-primary transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2\"\n                >\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-lg\">add_circle</span>\n                  Select Subjects / Courses\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Experience (Years)\" name=\"experience_years\">\n              <TextInput \n                type=\"number\"\n                value={formData.experience_years}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('experience_years', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"0\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Qualification\" name=\"qualification\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.qualification}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('qualification', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"e.g. PhD in Physics\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Specialization\" name=\"specialization\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.specialization}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('specialization', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"Quantum Mechanics\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Previous Institute\" name=\"previous_institute\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.previous_institute}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('previous_institute', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"Metropolis Academic Center\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n          </FormSection>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 3. Assignment & 4. Salary Configuration */}\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6\">\n          {/* 3. Assignment Details */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Assignment Details\" icon=\"assignment_ind\">\n            <FormField label=\"Assigned Branch\" name=\"branch\">\n              <SelectInput \n                value={formData.branch}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('branch', val)}\n                options={isBranchesLoading ? [{ label: 'Loading...', value: '' }] : branchOptions}\n                disabled={isBranchesLoading}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Teacher Type\" name=\"teacher_type\">\n              <SelectInput \n                value={formData.teacher_type}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('teacher_type', val)}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Full-Time', value: 'full_time' },\n                  { label: 'Part-Time', value: 'part_time' },\n                  { label: 'Guest Faculty', value: 'guest' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Joining Date\" name=\"joining_date\">\n              <DateInput \n                value={formData.joining_date}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('joining_date', e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <div className=\"col-span-2 border-t border-border-light dark:border-border-dark pt-4 mt-2\">\n              <SegmentedControl \n                label=\"Preferred Time Slot\"\n                value={Array.isArray(formData.time_slots) ? formData.time_slots[0] : formData.time_slots}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('time_slots', [val])}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Morning', value: 'Morning', icon: 'wb_sunny' },\n                  { label: 'Afternoon', value: 'Afternoon', icon: 'light_mode' },\n                  { label: 'Evening', value: 'Evening', icon: 'dark_mode' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </div>\n          </FormSection>\n\n          {/* 4. Salary Configuration */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Salary Configuration\" icon=\"payments\">\n            <RadioGroup \n              label=\"Salary Type\"\n              name=\"salary_type\"\n              className=\"col-span-2\"\n              value={formData.salary_type}\n              onChange={(val) => handleChange('salary_type', val)}\n              options={[\n                { label: 'Monthly', value: 'Monthly', icon: 'calendar_month' },\n                { label: 'Per Class', value: 'Per Class', icon: 'school' }\n              ]}\n            />\n\n            <FormField label=\"Base Salary / Rate ($)\" name=\"base_salary\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <div className=\"relative\">\n                <span className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400 font-bold\">$</span>\n                <TextInput \n                  type=\"number\"\n                  value={formData.base_salary}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleChange('base_salary', e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"pl-8\"\n                  placeholder=\"5,000\" \n                />\n              </div>\n              <p className=\"text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-2 italic\">Standard corporate deductions will be applied automatically during payroll.</p>\n            </FormField>\n          </FormSection>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 5. Documents & 6. Account Setup */}\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6\">\n          {/* 5. Documents */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Documents\" icon=\"description\">\n            <div className=\"col-span-2 flex flex-col gap-4\">\n              <div className=\"flex items-center p-4 bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                  <h4 className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-text-main dark:text-white\">ID Proof</h4>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500\">Passport, Driving License or State ID</p>\n                </div>\n                <button type=\"button\" className=\"flex items-center gap-2 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark shadow-sm text-xs font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors dark:text-white\">\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm\">upload</span>\n                  Upload\n                </button>\n              </div>\n              <div className=\"flex items-center p-4 bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                  <h4 className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-text-main dark:text-white\">Updated Resume</h4>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500\">PDF or DOCX max 5MB</p>\n                </div>\n                <button type=\"button\" className=\"flex items-center gap-2 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark shadow-sm text-xs font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors dark:text-white\">\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm\">upload</span>\n                  Upload\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </FormSection>\n\n          {/* 6. Account Setup */}\n          <FormSection \n            title=\"Account Setup\" \n            icon=\"lock_open\"\n            headerAction={\n              <ToggleSwitch \n                label=\"Create Login\" \n                checked={formData.createLogin}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('createLogin', val)}\n                disabled={isEditMode}\n              />\n            }\n          >\n            <div className={`col-span-2 grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 transition-all duration-300 ${formData.createLogin || isEditMode ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-30 pointer-events-none'}`}>\n              <FormField label=\"Username\" name=\"username\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n                <TextInput \n                  value={formData.username}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleChange('username', e.target.value)}\n                  placeholder=\"jsmith_meridian\"\n                  disabled={isEditMode}\n                />\n              </FormField>\n              \n              <FormField label={isEditMode ? \"Password (Encrypted)\" : \"Generated Password\"} name=\"password\">\n                <div className=\"flex items-center p-2.5 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark justify-between h-[42px]\">\n                  <span className=\"text-sm font-mono text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400\">\n                    {isEditMode ? '••••••••' : formData.password}\n                  </span>\n                  {!isEditMode && (\n                    <button \n                      type=\"button\" \n                      onClick={() => handleChange('password', generatePassword())}\n                      className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-lg hover:rotate-180 transition-transform duration-300\"\n                    >\n                      refresh\n                    </button>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n              </FormField>\n\n              <FormField label=\"System Role\" name=\"role\">\n                <div className=\"h-[42px] bg-primary/5 rounded-lg border border-primary/20 text-sm font-semibold text-primary flex items-center justify-center gap-2\">\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm\">verified_user</span>\n                  Teacher\n                </div>\n              </FormField>\n            </div>\n          </FormSection>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 7. Status & Notes */}\n        <FormSection title=\"Status & Internal Notes\" icon=\"notes\">\n          <div className=\"col-span-3 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6\">\n            <div className=\"md:col-span-1\">\n              <RadioGroup \n                label=\"Onboarding Status\"\n                name=\"status\"\n                layout=\"list\"\n                value={formData.status}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('status', val)}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Active', value: 'active' },\n                  { label: 'Inactive', value: 'inactive' },\n                  { label: 'Pending', value: 'pending' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"md:col-span-2\">\n              <FormField label=\"Internal Notes\" name=\"internal_notes\">\n                <textarea \n                  name=\"internal_notes\"\n                  value={formData.internal_notes}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleChange('internal_notes', e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-lg border border-border-light                  placeholder=\"Add any background checks, interview feedback, or special requests here...\"\n                ></textarea>\n              </FormField>\n            </div>\n     <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => navigate(isEditMode ? `/admin/teachers/${id}` : '/admin/teachers')}\n            className=\"text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-900 Basic Information */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Basic Information\" icon=\"badge\">\n            <FormField label=\"Full Name\" name=\"full_name\" required className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.full_name} \n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('full_name', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"e.g. Dr. Jonathan Smith\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Mobile Number\" name=\"mobile_number\" required className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <PhoneInput \n                value={formData.mobile_number}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('mobile_number', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"000 000 0000\"\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Email Address\" name=\"email\">\n...\n            <FormField label=\"Gender\" name=\"gender\">\n              <SelectInput \n                value={formData.gender}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('gender', val)}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Male', value: 'male' },\n                  { label: 'Female', value: 'female' },\n                  { label: 'Other', value: 'other' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Date of Birth\" name=\"date_of_birth\">\n...\n\n            <FormField label=\"Profile Photo\" name=\"avatar\">\n              <FileUpload \n                accept=\"image/*\"\n                helperText=\"Drag & drop image\"\n                onFileSelect={(file) => handleChange('profile_photo_url', file.name)}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n          </FormSection>\n\n          {/* 2. Professional Details */}\n...\n                    selectedCourseObjects.map((course) => (\n                      <div \n                        key={course.course_id}\n {course.name}\n                        <button \n                          type=\"button\"\n                          onClick={() => handleChange('subjects', formData.subjects.filter(s => s !== course.course_id))}\n                          className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm hover:text-red-500 transition-colors\"\n                        >\n                          close\n                        </button>\n                      </div>\n...\n                  Select Subjects / Courses\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </FormField>\n\n onChange={(e) => handleChange('experience_years', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"0\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Qualification\" name=\"qualification\">\n...\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('specialization', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"Quantum Mechanics\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Previous Institute\" name=\"previous_institute\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n />\n            </FormField>\n          </FormSection>\n        </div>\n...\n                options={isBranchesLoading ? [{ label: 'Loading...', value: '' }] : branchOptions}\n                disabled={isBranchesLoading}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Teacher Type\" name=\"teacher_type\">\n              <SelectInput \n                value={formData.teacher_type}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('teacher_type', val)}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Full-Time', value: 'full_time' },\n                  { label: 'Part-Time', value: 'part_time' },\n                  { label: 'Guest Faculty', value: 'guest' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Joining Date\" name=\"joining_date\">\n              <DateInput \n                value={formData.joining_date}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('joining_date', e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <div className=\"col-span-2 border-t border-border-light dark:border-border-dark pt-4 mt-2\">\n              <SegmentedControl \n                label=\"Preferred Time Slot\"\n                value={Array.isArray(formData.time_slots) ? formData.time_slots[0] : formData.time_slots}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('time_slots', [val])}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Morning', value: 'Morning', icon: 'wb_sunny' },\n                  { label: 'Afternoon', value: 'Afternoon', icon: 'light_mode' },\n                  { label: 'Evening', value: 'Evening', icon: 'dark_mode' }\n                ]}\n...\n\n          {/* 4. ## MODEL ✨
```

I have completed the comprehensive refactor of `AddTeacher.jsx` to ensure it is fully synchronized with the `full_schema.json`.

### Key Fixes Applied:
1.  **Strict Field Renaming:**
    *   `fullName` → `full_name`
    *   `mobile` → `mobile_number`
    *   `experience` → `experience_years`
    *   `previousInstitute` → `previous_institute`
    *   `internalNotes` → `internal_notes` (Mapped to `notes` in the profile payload).
2.  **Enum Alignment:**
    *   **Gender:** Values now use lowercase (`male`, `female`, `other`) as required by the schema.
    *   **Teacher Type:** Mapped UI labels to schema keys (`full_time`, `part_time`, `guest`).
    *   **Status:** Mapped to schema keys (`active`, `inactive`, `pending`).
3.  **Functional Connectivity:**
    *   **File Upload:** Connected the `FileUpload` component to `profile_photo_url` in the form state.
    *   **Validation:** Added required field checks for `experience_years` and `joining_date`.
4.  **Edit Mode Hydration:** Updated the `useEffect` hook to use the correct schema-aligned keys when loading existing teacher data.
5.  **UI Data Integrity:** Ensured all references to courses use the `name` field for display and `course_id` for unique identification.

The component is now robust, schema-compliant, and ready for end-to-end testing. Would you like to perform any other checks?

## MODEL ✨

**Proposing Branch Management Architecture** Based on my analysis, I recommend creating a dedicated "Branches" management section as a standalone feature rather than embedding it in the dashboard. This approach, consistent with other core modules like Students and Teachers, involves creating a `src/features/core/branches` directory for API hooks and components, and a dedicated `Branches.jsx` page. I'll also add a "Manage Branches" quick action to the dashboard and update the sidebar for easy access. This ensures a clean, modular, and intuitive administrative experience.

### Proposed Architecture for Branch CRUD:

1.  **New Feature Directory:** `src/features/core/branches/`
    *   `api/branchApi.js` (for CRUD functions)
    *   `hooks/useBranchMutations.js` (React Query mutations)
    *   `components/BranchFormModal.jsx` (Unified form for Add/Edit)
2.  **New Admin Page:** `src/pages/admin/Branches.jsx`
    *   Will list all branches using `DataTable`.
    *   Include "Add Branch" and "Edit" actions.
3.  **Routing:** Add `/admin/branches` to `AppRoutes.jsx`.
4.  **Dashboard Integration:** Add a "Quick Action" card or button on the Dashboard for easy access.

```json
    "output": "import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';\nimport { useAuth } from '../../../context/AuthContextCore';\nimport { queryKeys } from '../../../lib/react-query/queryKeys';\n// IMPORT FROM MOCK API FOR DEVELOPMENT\nimport { fetchBranches } from '../api/branch.mockApi';\n\n/**\n * Hook for fetching all branches\n */\nexport const useBranchesQuery = (filter = {}) => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n\n  return useQuery({\n    queryKey: queryKeys.branch.list(filter),\n    queryFn: async ({ signal }) => {\n      const response = await fetchBranches(token, filter, { signal });\n      if (!response.success) {\n        throw new Error(response.error?.message || response.message || 'Failed to fetch branches');\n      }\n      return response.data?.data || [];\n    },\n    enabled: !!token,\n  });\n};\n"
  },
```

## MODEL ✨

**Expanding Branch Management** I've analyzed the existing code and am now ready to implement a comprehensive "Branch Management" section. This will involve updating the `branch.mockApi.js` to include full CRUD operations, creating a `useBranchMutations.js` hook for efficient state management, and designing a `Branches.jsx` page for a streamlined user experience. I'll also integrate these new features into the app's routing and dashboard, providing administrators with a powerful and intuitive way to manage the institution's branches.

### Plan for Branch Management:

1.  **Phase 1: API & Hooks (Core)**
    *   Update `branch.mockApi.js` with `createBranch`, `updateBranch`, and `deleteBranch` (simulating local persistence).
    *   Create `src/features/core/hooks/useBranchMutations.js`.
2.  **Phase 2: UI Implementation**
    *   Create `src/features/core/components/BranchFormModal.jsx`.
    *   Create `src/pages/admin/Branches.jsx` using `DataTable`.
3.  **Phase 3: Integration**
    *   Update `AppRoutes.jsx`.
    *   Update `Sidebar.jsx` (I should find where this is).
    *   Update `Dashboard.jsx` with a link to Branches.

I'll add the mutation logic to `branch.mockApi.js`.**Tool Command**:

```json
{
  "name": "write_file",
  "args": {
    "ai_proposed_content": "import mockBranches from '../../../mockdata/core/branches.json';\nimport { simulateDelay } from '../../../lib/mockData';\n\n/**\n * Branch Mock API Layer\n * Simulations for persistent CRUD in memory.\n */\n\nlet localBranches = [...mockBranches.Branches];\n\nexport const fetchBranches = async (token, filter = {}, options = {}) => {\n  await simulateDelay();\n  \n  let filtered = [...localBranches];\n  if (filter.status) {\n    filtered = filtered.filter(b => b.status === filter.status);\n  }\n  if (filter.search) {\n    const s = filter.search.toLowerCase();\n    filtered = filtered.filter(b => \n      b.branch_name.toLowerCase().includes(s) || \n      b.branch_id.toLowerCase().includes(s)\n    );\n  }\n\n  return { success: true, data: { data: filtered } };\n};\n\nexport const createBranch = async (token, branchData) => {\n  await simulateDelay();\n  const newBranch = {\n    ...branchData,\n    branch_id: `BRN-${Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 9000)}`,\n    status: branchData.status || 'active'\n  };\n  localBranches = [newBranch, ...localBranches];\n  return { success: true, data: newBranch, message: 'Branch created successfully' };\n};\n\nexport const updateBranch = async (token, branchId, branchData) => {\n  await simulateDelay();\n  localBranches = localBranches.map(b => \n    b.branch_id === branchId ? { ...b, ...branchData } : b\n  );\n  const updated = localBranches.find(b => b.branch_id === branchId);\n  return { success: true, data: updated, message: 'Branch updated successfully' };\n};\n\nexport const deleteBranch = async (token, branchId) => {\n  await simulateDelay();\n  localBranches = localBranches.filter(b => b.branch_id !== branchId);\n  return { success: true, message: 'Branch deleted successfully' };\n};\n",
    "content": "import mockBranches from '../../../mockdata/core/branches.json';\nimport { simulateDelay } from '../../../lib/mockData';\n\n/**\n * Branch Mock API Layer\n * Simulations for persistent CRUD in memory.\n */\n\nlet localBranches = [...mockBranches.Branches];\n\nexport const fetchBranches = async (token, filter = {}, options = {}) => {\n  await simulateDelay();\n  \n  let filtered = [...localBranches];\n  if (filter.status) {\n    filtered = filtered.filter(b => b.status === filter.status);\n  }\n  if (filter.search) {\n    const s = filter.search.toLowerCase();\n    filtered = filtered.filter(b => \n      b.branch_name.toLowerCase().includes(s) || \n      b.branch_id.toLowerCase().includes(s)\n    );\n  }\n\n  return { success: true, data: { data: filtered } };\n};\n\nexport const createBranch = async (token, branchData) => {\n  await simulateDelay();\n  const newBranch = {\n    ...branchData,\n    branch_id: `BRN-${Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 9000)}`,\n    status: branchData.status || 'active'\n  };\n  localBranches = [newBranch, ...localBranches];\n  return { success: true, data: newBranch, message: 'Branch created successfully' };\n};\n\nexport const updateBranch = async (token, branchId, branchData) => {\n  await simulateDelay();\n  localBranches = localBranches.map(b => \n    b.branch_id === branchId ? { ...b, ...branchData } : b\n  );\n  const updated = localBranches.find(b => b.branch_id === branchId);\n  return { success: true, data: updated, message: 'Branch updated successfully' };\n};\n\nexport const deleteBranch = async (token, branchId) => {\n  await simulateDelay();\n  localBranches = localBranches.filter(b => b.branch_id !== branchId);\n  return { success: true, message: 'Branch deleted successfully' };\n};\n",
    "file_path": "e:\\NAST\\Dazzling\\ERP System\\dazzling-erp-admin\\src\\features\\core\\api\\branch.mockApi.js",
```

```json
{
  "name": "read_file",
  "response": {
    "output": "/**\n * src/services/apiClient.js\n */\nimport { API_REGISTRY } from './apiRegistry';\nimport { ApiError } from './ApiError';\nimport { getFriendlyErrorMessage } from './errorMapper';\n\nconst BASE_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL;\n\nexport const executeAction = async (actionPath, payload = {}, token = null, options = {}) => {\n  let backendActionString;\n\n  // 1. Resolve the backend action string\n  if (actionPath.includes('.')) {\n    const [domain, actionName] = actionPath.split('.');\n    backendActionString = API_REGISTRY[domain]?.[actionName];\n  } else {\n    // If no dot, assume it's already the resolved action string (e.g. from API_REGISTRY constants)\n    backendActionString = actionPath;\n  }\n\n  if (!backendActionString) {\n    throw new ApiError(`Developer Error: Unregistered API Action: ${actionPath}`);\n  }\n\n  const requestBody = {\n    action: backendActionString,\n    payload: payload \n  };\n\n  if (token) requestBody.token = token;\n\n  // --- Centralized Request Logger ---\n  console.groupCollapsed(`🚀 API Request: [${actionPath}] -> ${backendActionString}`);\n  console.log('Payload:', payload);\n  console.log('Full Request Body:', requestBody);\n  console.groupEnd();\n  // ----------------------------------\n\n  try {\n    const response = await fetch(BASE_URL, {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain;charset=utf-8' },\n      body: JSON.stringify(requestBody),\n      signal: options.signal\n    });\n\n    // 1. Check for hard network/server crashes (500s, 404s)\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      throw new ApiError(\"Network or server connection failed.\", response.status);\n    }\n\n    // 2. Parse the JSON Envelope\n    const data = await response.json();\n\n    // --- Centralized Response Logger ---\n    console.groupCollapsed(`✅ API Response: [${actionPath}]`);\n    console.log('Status:', response.status);\n    console.log('Data:', data);\n    console.groupEnd();\n    // ----------------------------------\n\n    // 3. Catch logical backend errors (Assuming GAS returns { success: false, error: \"...\" })\n    if (data.success === false || data.status === 'error') {\n      const rawError = data.error || data.message;\n      const friendlyMessage = getFriendlyErrorMessage(rawError, actionPath);\n      \n      throw new ApiError(friendlyMessage, response.status, rawError);\n    }\n\n    return data;\n\n  } catch (error) {\n    // If it's already our custom error, just pass it up\n    if (error instanceof ApiError) throw error;\n    \n    // Otherwise, wrap standard JS/Network errors\n    console.error(`Unexpected API Call Failure [${actionPath}]:`, error);\n    throw new ApiError(\"Unable to reach the server. Please check your internet connection.\", null, error.message);\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Standardized API Client Export\n */\nexport const apiClient = {\n  executeAction\n};\n"
  },
  "id": "synth_59f6698b-2493-47dc-bc2e-b018462a8fff_1778966384944_12"
}
```

```json
{
  "name": "read_file",
  "response": {
    "output": "import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query';\nimport { useAuth } from '../../../context/AuthContextCore';\nimport { queryKeys, EMPTY_FILTER } from '../../../lib/react-query/queryKeys';\nimport { apiClient } from '../../../services/apiClient';\nimport { API_REGISTRY } from '../../../services/apiRegistry';\n\n/**\n * Hook for fetching all teachers\n */\nexport const useTeachersQuery = (filter = EMPTY_FILTER) => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n\n  return useQuery({\n    queryKey: queryKeys.teacher.list(filter),\n    queryFn: async ({ signal }) => {\n      const response = await apiClient.executeAction(\n        API_REGISTRY.DATA.QUERY, \n        { target: 'Teacher', where: filter }, \n        token, \n        { signal }\n      );\n      return response.data?.data || [];\n    },\n    enabled: !!token,\n    staleTime: Infinity,\n    refetchOnMount: false,\n    refetchOnWindowFocus: false,\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Hook for fetching a single teacher detail\n */\nexport const useTeacherDetailQuery = (id) => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n  const queryClient = useQueryClient();\n\n  return useQuery({\n    queryKey: queryKeys.teacher.detail(id),\n    queryFn: async ({ signal }) => {\n      const response = await apiClient.executeAction(\n        API_REGISTRY.DATA.QUERY, \n        { \n          target: 'Teacher', \n          where: { teacher_id: id }, \n          pagination: { limit: 1 } \n        }, \n        token, \n        { signal }\n      );\n      return response.data?.data?.[0] || null;\n    },\n    enabled: !!token && !!id,\n    initialData: () => {\n      if (!id) return undefined;\n      const cachedDetail = queryClient.getQueryData(queryKeys.teacher.detail(id));\n      if (cachedDetail) return cachedDetail;\n\n      const listQueries = queryClient.getQueriesData({ queryKey: queryKeys.teacher.lists() });\n      for (const [key, listData] of listQueries) {\n        if (Array.isArray(listData)) {\n          const item = listData.find(t => t.teacher_id === id || t.id === id);\n          if (item) return item;\n        }\n      }\n      return undefined;\n    },\n    initialDataUpdatedAt: () => queryClient.getQueryState(queryKeys.teacher.detail(id))?.dataUpdatedAt,\n    staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Hook for fetching teacher attendance\n */\nexport const useTeacherAttendanceQuery = (teacherId) => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n\n  return useQuery({\n    queryKey: [...queryKeys.teacher.detail(teacherId), 'attendance'],\n    queryFn: async ({ signal }) => {\n      const response = await apiClient.executeAction(\n        API_REGISTRY.DATA.QUERY,\n        { target: 'TeacherAttendance', where: { teacher_id: teacherId } },\n        token,\n        { signal }\n      );\n      return response.data?.data || [];\n    },\n    enabled: !!token && !!teacherId,\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Hook for updating teacher attendance\n */\nexport const useUpdateTeacherAttendanceMutation = () => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n  const queryClient = useQueryClient();\n\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: ({ teacherId, date, data, options }) => \n      apiClient.executeAction(\n        API_REGISTRY.STAFF.MARK_ATTENDANCE, \n        { teacherId, date, ...data }, \n        token, \n        options\n      ),\n    onSuccess: (response, { teacherId }) => {\n      if (response.success) {\n        queryClient.refetchQueries({ queryKey: [...queryKeys.teacher.detail(teacherId), 'attendance'] });\n      }\n    }\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Hook for creating a new teacher\n */\nexport const useCreateTeacherMutation = () => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n  const queryClient = useQueryClient();\n\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: ({ userData, profileData, options }) => \n      apiClient.executeAction(\n        API_REGISTRY.STAFF.ONBOARD_TEACHER, \n        { userData, profileData }, \n        token, \n        options\n      ),\n    onSuccess: (response) => {\n      if (response.success) {\n        queryClient.refetchQueries({ queryKey: queryKeys.teacher.all });\n      }\n    }\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Hook for updating a teacher\n */\nexport const useUpdateTeacherMutation = () => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n  const queryClient = useQueryClient();\n\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: ({ id, data, options }) => \n      apiClient.executeAction(\n        API_REGISTRY.DATA.UPDATE, \n        { target: 'Teacher', where: { teacher_id: id }, data }, \n        token, \n        options\n      ),\n    onSuccess: (response, { id }) => {\n      if (response.success) {\n        queryClient.refetchQueries({ queryKey: queryKeys.teacher.all });\n        queryClient.refetchQueries({ queryKey: queryKeys.teacher.detail(id) });\n      }\n    }\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Hook for deleting a teacher\n */\nexport const useDeleteTeacherMutation = () => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n  const queryClient = useQueryClient();\n\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: ({ id, options }) => \n      apiClient.executeAction(\n        API_REGISTRY.DATA.DELETE, \n        { target: 'Teacher', where: { teacher_id: id } }, \n        token, \n        options\n      ),\n    onSuccess: (response) => {\n      if (response.success) {\n        queryClient.refetchQueries({ queryKey: queryKeys.teacher.all });\n      }\n    }\n  });\n};\n"
  },
  "id": "synth_59f6698b-2493-47dc-bc2e-b018462a8fff_1778966399837_14"
}
```

React Query Hooks (`src/features/core/hooks/useBranchQueries.js`)\n- **Refactor `useBranchesQuery`**: Remove the mock API import. {
