handleSubmit = (e) => {\n    if (e) e.preventDefault();\n    setError(null);\n    setFieldErrors({});\n\n    const validationError = validateForm();\n    if (validationError) {\n      setError(validationError);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (isEditMode) {\n      // Prepare profileData strictly according to Schema\n      const profileData = {\n        full_name: formData.full_name,\n        mobile_number: formData.mobile_number,\n        email: formData.email,\n        gender: formData.gender,\n        date_of_birth: formData.date_of_birth,\n        profile_photo_url: formData.profile_photo_url,\n        experience_years: parseInt(formData.experience_years, 10) || 0,\n        qualification: formData.qualification,\n        specialization: formData.specialization,\n        previous_institute: formData.previous_institute,\n        teacher_type: formData.teacher_type,\n        joining_date: formData.joining_date,\n        status: formData.status,\n        notes: formData.internal_notes,\n        subject_code: formData.subjects.join(', '),\n        metadata: {\n          address: formData.address,\n          branch: formData.branch,\n          time_slots: formData.time_slots,\n          salary_type: formData.salary_type,\n          base_salary: parseFloat(formData.base_salary) || 0,\n          subjects: formData.subjects // Store array in metadata for easier retrieval\n        }\n      };\n\n      updateMutation.mutate({ id, data: profileData }, {\n        onSuccess: (res) => {\n          if (res.success) navigate(`/admin/teachers/${id}`);\n          else setError(res.message || 'Failed to update profile.');\n        },\n        onError: (err) => setError(err.message)\n      });\n    } else {\n      // New payload format mapped to staff_onboard_teacher API\n      const requestPayload = {\n        full_name: formData.full_name,\n        mobile_number: formData.mobile_number,\n        email: formData.email || null,\n        experience_years: parseInt(formData.experience_years, 10) || 0,\n        qualification: formData.qualification,\n        teacher_type: formData.teacher_type,\n        joining_date: formData.joining_date,\n        status: formData.status,\n        subjects: formData.subjects,\n        userData: formData.createLogin ? {\n          username: formData.username || formData.full_name.toLowerCase().replace(/\\s+/g, '_'),\n          password: formData.password\n        } : undefined,\n        salary_config: {\n          salary_type: formData.salary_type.toLowerCase(),\n          base_amount: parseFloat(formData.base_salary) || 0,\n          effective_from: formData.joining_date\n        },\n        documents: formData.profile_photo_url ? [\n          {\n            document_type: \"id_proof\", \n            file_url: formData.profile_photo_url\n          }\n        ] : []\n      };\n\n      addMutation.mutate(requestPayload, {\n        onSuccess: (res) => {\n          if (res.success) {\n            navigate('/admin/teachers');\n          } else {\n            // Handle new field-level ValidationError\n            const err = res.error;\n            if (err?.type === 'ValidationError' && err.details?.fields) {\n              const errorsMap = {};\n              err.details.fields.forEach((item) => {\n                errorsMap[item.field] = item.message;\n              });\n              setFieldErrors(errorsMap);\n              setError(err.message || 'Please fix the errors highlighted below.');\n            } else {\n              setError(res.message || err?.message || 'Failed to register faculty.');\n            }\n          }\n        },\n        onError: (err) => setError(err.message)\n      });\n    }\n  };\n  const handleCoursesSelect = (selectedObjects) => {\n    const identifiers = selectedObjects.map(c => c.course_id);\n    handleChange('subjects', identifiers);\n  };\n\n  if (isEditMode && isFetchingTeacher) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center min-h-[400px]\">\n        <div className=\"size-12 border-4 border-primary/30 border-t-primary rounded-full animate-spin\"></div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"pb-32\">\n      <CourseSelectionModal \n        isOpen={isCourseModalOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsCourseModalOpen(false)}\n        onSelect={handleCoursesSelect}\n        selectedCourses={selectedCourseObjects}\n        availableCourses={coursesData || []}\n      />\n      {/* Top Header Section */}\n      <header className=\"mb-8 flex justify-between items-end px-4 lg:px-0\">\n        <div>\n          <nav className=\"flex text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary mb-2 gap-2 items-center\">\n            <Link to=\"/admin\" className=\"hover:text-primary transition-colors\">Management</Link>\n            <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-[12px]\">chevron_right</span>\n            <Link to=\"/admin/teachers\" className=\"hover:text-primary transition-colors\">Teachers</Link>\n            <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-[12px]\">chevron_right</span>\n            <span className=\"text-primary font-bold\">{isEditMode ? 'Edit Profile' : 'New Registration'}</span>\n          </nav>\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-text-main dark:text-white\">\n            {isEditMode ? 'Edit Faculty Profile' : 'Teacher Registration'}\n          </h1>\n          <p className=\"text-text-secondary mt-1 font-medium text-sm\">\n            {isEditMode ? `Updating information for ${formData.full_name}` : 'Onboard a new faculty member to the Meridian ecosystem.'}\n          </p>\n        </div>\n        \n        <div className=\"hidden md:flex items-center bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm\">\n          <span className=\"text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase mr-4 tracking-widest\">\n            {isEditMode ? 'Profile Integrity' : 'Progress'}\n          </span>\n          <div className=\"w-32 h-2 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden\">\n            <div className=\"bg-primary w-3/4 h-full\"></div>\n          </div>\n          <span className=\"ml-4 text-xs font-bold text-primary\">{isEditMode ? '100%' : '25%'}</span>\n        </div>\n      </header>\n\n      {error && (\n        <div className=\"mx-4 lg:mx-0 mb-6 bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/20 text-red-600 p-4 rounded-lg border border-red-100 dark:border-red-800 flex items-center gap-3 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-2\">\n          <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined\">error</span>\n          <span className=\"text-sm font-bold\">{error}</span>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <form className=\"space-y-6 px-4 lg:px-0\" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>\n        {/* Section 1 & 2: Grid Layout */}\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6\">\n          {/* 1. Basic Information */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Basic Information\" icon=\"badge\">\n            <FormField label=\"Full Name\" name=\"full_name\" required className=\"col-span-2\" error={fieldErrors['full_name']}>\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.full_name} \n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('full_name', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"e.g. Dr. Jonathan Smith\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Mobile Number\" name=\"mobile_number\" required className=\"col-span-2\" error={fieldErrors['mobile_number']}>\n              <PhoneInput \n                value={formData.mobile_number}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('mobile_number', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"000 000 0000\"\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Email Address\" name=\"email\" error={fieldErrors['email']}>\n              <TextInput \n                type=\"email\"\n                value={formData.email}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('email', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"jonathan@meridian.com\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Gender\" name=\"gender\">\n              <SelectInput \n                value={formData.gender}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('gender', val)}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Male', value: 'male' },\n                  { label: 'Female', value: 'female' },\n                  { label: 'Other', value: 'other' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Date of Birth\" name=\"date_of_birth\">\n              <DateInput \n                value={formData.date_of_birth}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('date_of_birth', e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Residential Address\" name=\"address\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.address} \n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('address', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"Full residential address...\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Profile Photo\" name=\"avatar\">\n              <FileUpload \n                accept=\"image/*\"\n                helperText=\"Drag & drop image\"\n                onFileSelect={(file) => handleChange('profile_photo_url', file.name)}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n          </FormSection>\n\n          {/* 2. Professional Details */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Professional Details\" icon=\"history_edu\">\n            <FormField label=\"Subjects/Courses\" name=\"subjects\" className=\"col-span-2\" error={fieldErrors['subjects']}>\n              <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n                <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2 min-h-[42px] p-2 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700\">\n                  {selectedCourseObjects.length > 0 ? (\n                    selectedCourseObjects.map((course) => (\n                      <div \n                        key={course.course_id}\n                        className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 bg-primary/10 text-primary rounded-lg border border-primary/20 text-[11px] font-bold\"\n                      >\n                        {course.name}\n                        <button \n                          type=\"button\"\n                          onClick={() => handleChange('subjects', formData.subjects.filter(s => s !== course.course_id))}\n                          className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm hover:text-red-500 transition-colors\"\n                        >\n                          close\n                        </button>\n                      </div>\n                    ))\n                  ) : (\n                    <span className=\"text-xs text-slate-400 italic flex items-center px-2\">No courses selected</span>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <button\n                  type=\"button\"\n                  onClick={() => setIsCourseModalOpen(true)}\n                  className=\"w-full py-2.5 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 border-2 border-dashed border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 hover:border-primary hover:text-primary transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2\"\n                >\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-lg\">add_circle</span>\n                  Select Subjects / Courses\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Experience (Years)\" name=\"experience_years\">\n              <TextInput \n                type=\"number\"\n                value={formData.experience_years}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('experience_years', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"0\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Qualification\" name=\"qualification\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.qualification}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('qualification', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"e.g. PhD in Physics\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Specialization\" name=\"specialization\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.specialization}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('specialization', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"Quantum Mechanics\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Previous Institute\" name=\"previous_institute\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.previous_institute}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('previous_institute', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"Metropolis Academic Center\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n          </FormSection>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 3. Assignment & 4. Salary Configuration */}\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6\">\n          {/* 3. Assignment Details */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Assignment Details\" icon=\"assignment_ind\">\n            <FormField label=\"Assigned Branch\" name=\"branch\">\n              <SelectInput \n                value={formData.branch}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('branch', val)}\n                options={isBranchesLoading ? [{ label: 'Loading...', value: '' }] : branchOptions}\n                disabled={isBranchesLoading}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Teacher Type\" name=\"teacher_type\">\n              <SelectInput \n                value={formData.teacher_type}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('teacher_type', val)}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Full-Time', value: 'full_time' },\n                  { label: 'Part-Time', value: 'part_time' },\n                  { label: 'Guest Faculty', value: 'guest' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Joining Date\" name=\"joining_date\">\n              <DateInput \n                value={formData.joining_date}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('joining_date', e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <div className=\"col-span-2 border-t border-border-light dark:border-border-dark pt-4 mt-2\">\n              <SegmentedControl \n                label=\"Preferred Time Slot\"\n                value={Array.isArray(formData.time_slots) ? formData.time_slots[0] : formData.time_slots}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('time_slots', [val])}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Morning', value: 'Morning', icon: 'wb_sunny' },\n                  { label: 'Afternoon', value: 'Afternoon', icon: 'light_mode' },\n                  { label: 'Evening', value: 'Evening', icon: 'dark_mode' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </div>\n          </FormSection>\n\n          {/* 4. Salary Configuration */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Salary Configuration\" icon=\"payments\">\n            <RadioGroup \n              label=\"Salary Type\"\n              name=\"salary_type\"\n              className=\"col-span-2\"\n              value={formData.salary_type}\n              onChange={(val) => handleChange('salary_type', val)}\n              options={[\n                { label: 'Monthly', value: 'Monthly', icon: 'calendar_month' },\n                { label: 'Per Class', value: 'Per Class', icon: 'school' }\n              ]}\n            />\n\n            <FormField label=\"Base Salary / Rate ($)\" name=\"base_salary\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <div className=\"relative\">\n                <span className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400 font-bold\">$</span>\n                <TextInput \n                  type=\"number\"\n                  value={formData.base_salary}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleChange('base_salary', e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"pl-8\"\n                  placeholder=\"5,000\" \n                />\n              </div>\n              <p className=\"text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-2 italic\">Standard corporate deductions will be applied automatically during payroll.</p>\n            </FormField>\n          </FormSection>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 5. Documents & 6. Account Setup */}\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6\">\n          {/* 5. Documents */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Documents\" icon=\"description\">\n            <div className=\"col-span-2 flex flex-col gap-4\">\n              <div className=\"flex items-center p-4 bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                  <h4 className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-text-main dark:text-white\">ID Proof</h4>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500\">Passport, Driving License or State ID</p>\n                </div>\n                <button type=\"button\" className=\"flex items-center gap-2 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark shadow-sm text-xs font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors dark:text-white\">\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm\">upload</span>\n                  Upload\n                </button>\n              </div>\n              <div className=\"flex items-center p-4 bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                  <h4 className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-text-main dark:text-white\">Updated Resume</h4>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500\">PDF or DOCX max 5MB</p>\n                </div>\n                <button type=\"button\" className=\"flex items-center gap-2 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark shadow-sm text-xs font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors dark:text-white\">\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm\">upload</span>\n                  Upload\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </FormSection>\n\n          {/* 6. Account Setup */}\n          <FormSection \n            title=\"Account Setup\" \n            icon=\"lock_open\"\n            headerAction={\n              <ToggleSwitch \n                label=\"Create Login\" \n                checked={formData.createLogin}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('createLogin', val)}\n                disabled={isEditMode}\n              />\n            }\n          >\n            <div className={`col-span-2 grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 transition-all duration-300 ${formData.createLogin || isEditMode ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-30 pointer-events-none'}`}>\n              <FormField label=\"Username\" name=\"username\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n                <TextInput \n                  value={formData.username}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleChange('username', e.target.value)}\n                  placeholder=\"jsmith_meridian\"\n                  disabled={isEditMode}\n                />\n              </FormField>\n              \n              <FormField label={isEditMode ? \"Password (Encrypted)\" : \"Generated Password\"} name=\"password\">\n                <div className=\"flex items-center p-2.5 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark justify-between h-[42px]\">\n                  <span className=\"text-sm font-mono text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400\">\n                    {isEditMode ? '••••••••' : formData.password}\n                  </span>\n                  {!isEditMode && (\n                    <button \n                      type=\"button\" \n                      onClick={() => handleChange('password', generatePassword())}\n                      className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-lg hover:rotate-180 transition-transform duration-300\"\n                    >\n                      refresh\n                    </button>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n              </FormField>\n\n              <FormField label=\"System Role\" name=\"role\">\n                <div className=\"h-[42px] bg-primary/5 rounded-lg border border-primary/20 text-sm font-semibold text-primary flex items-center justify-center gap-2\">\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm\">verified_user</span>\n                  Teacher\n                </div>\n              </FormField>\n            </div>\n          </FormSection>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 7. Status & Notes */}\n        <FormSection title=\"Status & Internal Notes\" icon=\"notes\">\n          <div className=\"col-span-3 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6\">\n            <div className=\"md:col-span-1\">\n              <RadioGroup \n                label=\"Onboarding Status\"\n                name=\"status\"\n                layout=\"list\"\n                value={formData.status}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('status', val)}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Active', value: 'active' },\n                  { label: 'Inactive', value: 'inactive' },\n                  { label: 'Pending', value: 'pending' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"md:col-span-2\">\n              <FormField label=\"Internal Notes\" name=\"internal_notes\">\n                <textarea \n                  name=\"internal_notes\"\n                  value={formData.internal_notes}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleChange('internal_notes', e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary text-sm p-3 outline-none min-h-[160px] resize-none dark:text-white transition-all\"\n                  placeholder=\"Add any background checks, interview feedback, or special requests here...\"\n                ></textarea>\n              </FormField>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </FormSection>\n      </form>\n\n      {/* Sticky Bottom Action Bar */}\n      <footer className=\"fixed bottom-0 right-0 w-full md:w-[calc(100%-16rem)] border-t z-50 bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-lg px-8 py-4 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4\">\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => navigate(isEditMode ? `/admin/teachers/${id}` : '/admin/teachers')}\n            className=\"text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-900 font-medium text-sm flex items-center gap-2 transition-colors\"\n          >\n            <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-lg\">close</span>\n            {isEditMode ? 'Discard Changes' : 'Cancel Registration'}\n          </button>\n          <div className=\"hidden md:block h-4 w-[1px] bg-slate-200\"></div>\n          <p className=\"hidden md:block text-[11px] text-slate-400 font-medium italic\">Changes are not saved automatically.</p>\n        </div>\n        \n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 w-full md:w-auto\">\n          {!isEditMode && (\n            <button type=\"button\" className=\"hidden lg:block px-5 py-2.5 rounded-lg border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 transition-colors font-semibold text-sm\">\n              Save & Create Another\n            </button>\n          )}\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={handleSubmit}\n            disabled={addMutation.isPending || updateMutation.isPending}\n            className=\"flex-1 md:flex-none px-8 py-2.5 rounded-lg bg-primary text-white hover:bg-blue-700 transition-all font-bold text-sm shadow-md shadow-primary/20 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 active:scale-95 disabled:opacity-70\"\n          >\n            {addMutation.isPending || updateMutation.isPending ? 'Saving...' : isEditMode ? 'Update Profile' : 'Complete Registration'}\n            <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-lg\">arrow_forward</span>\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </footer>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nexport default AddTeacher;"
  },

}

full_name, mobile -> mobile_number, etc).\n */\nconst AddTeacher = () => {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const isEditMode = !!id;\n  const [isCourseModalOpen, setIsCourseModalOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  // Utility to generate a random password\n  const generatePassword = () => {\n    const chars = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789!@#$%^&*';\n    return Array.from({ length: 10 }, () => chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length)]).join('');\n  };\n\n  // Mutations & Queries\n  const addMutation = useCreateTeacherMutation();\n  const updateMutation = useUpdateTeacherMutation();\n  const { data: existingTeacher, isLoading: isFetchingTeacher } = useTeacherDetailQuery(id);\n\n  // Dynamic Options\n  const { data: coursesData, isLoading: isCoursesLoading } = useCoursesQuery();\n  const { data: branchesData, isLoading: isBranchesLoading } = useBranchesQuery();\n\n  const branchOptions = branchesData?.map(branch => ({\n    label: branch.branch_name,\n    value: branch.branch_name\n  })) || [];\n\n  const [error, setError] = useState(null);\n  const [fieldErrors, setFieldErrors] = useState({});\n  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({\n    // Basic Info\n    full_name: '',\n    mobile_number: '',\n    email: '',\n    gender: 'male',\n    date_of_birth: '',\n    address: '',\n    profile_photo_url: '',\n\n    // Professional Details\n    subjects: [], \n    experience_years: '',\n    qualification: '',\n    specialization: '',\n    previous_institute: '',\n\n    // Assignment\n    branch: '',\n    teacher_type: 'full_time',\n    joining_date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],\n    time_slots: ['Morning'],\n\n    // Financials\n    salary_type: 'Monthly', \n    base_salary: '',\n\n    // Account\n    createLogin: false,\n    username: '',\n    password: generatePassword(),\n    role: 'Teacher',\n\n    // Status\n    status: 'active',\n    internal_notes: ''\n  });\n\n  const selectedCourseObjects = React.useMemo(() => {\n    if (!coursesData || !formData.subjects) return [];\n    return coursesData.filter(c => formData.subjects.includes(c.course_id));\n  }, [coursesData, formData.subjects]);\n\n  // Sync existing teacher data into form\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (isEditMode && existingTeacher) {\n      const meta = existingTeacher.metadata || {};\n      setFormData({\n        full_name: existingTeacher.full_name || '',\n        mobile_number: existingTeacher.mobile_number || '',\n        email: existingTeacher.email || '',\n        gender: existingTeacher.gender || 'male',\n        date_of_birth: existingTeacher.date_of_birth || '',\n        address: meta.address || '',\n        profile_photo_url: existingTeacher.profile_photo_url || '',\n\n        subjects: existingTeacher.subject_code ? existingTeacher.subject_code.split(', ').filter(Boolean) : [],\n        experience_years: existingTeacher.experience_years || '',\n        qualification: existingTeacher.qualification || '',\n        specialization: existingTeacher.specialization || '',\n        previous_institute: existingTeacher.previous_institute || '',\n\n        branch: meta.branch || '',\n        teacher_type: existingTeacher.teacher_type || 'full_time',\n        joining_date: existingTeacher.joining_date || '',\n        time_slots: meta.time_slots || ['Morning'],\n\n        salary_type: meta.salary_type || 'Monthly',\n        base_salary: meta.base_salary || '',\n\n        createLogin: false,\n        username: existingTeacher.username || '',\n        password: '••••••••',\n        role: 'Teacher',\n\n        status: existingTeacher.status || 'active',\n        internal_notes: existingTeacher.notes || ''\n      });\n    }\n  }, [isEditMode, existingTeacher]);\n\n  const handleChange = (name, value) => {\n    setFormData(prev => ({\n      ...prev,\n      [name]: value\n    }));\n  };\n\n  const validateForm = () => {\n    if (!formData.full_name.trim()) return \"Full Name is required.\";\n    if (!formData.mobile_number.trim()) return \"Mobile Number is required.\";\n    if (!formData.branch) return \"Assigned Branch is required.\";\n    if (!formData.experience_years) return \"Experience is required.\";\n    if (!formData.joining_date) return \"Joining Date is required.\";\n\n    if (formData.email && !/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(formData.email)) {\n      return \"Invalid email format.\";\n    }\n\n    if (formData.createLogin && !formData.username.trim()) {\n      return \"Username is required when 'Create Login' is enabled.\";\n    }\n\n    return null;\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = (e) => {\n    if (e) e.preventDefault();\n    setError(null);\n    setFieldErrors({});\n\n    const validationError = validateForm();\n    if (validationError) {\n      setError(validationError);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (isEditMode) {\n      // Prepare profileData strictly according to Schema\n      const profileData = {\n        full_name: formData.full_name,\n        mobile_number: formData.mobile_number,\n        email: formData.email,\n        gender: formData.gender,\n        date_of_birth: formData.date_of_birth,\n        profile_photo_url: formData.profile_photo_url,\n        experience_years: parseInt(formData.experience_years, 10) || 0,\n        qualification: formData.qualification,\n        specialization: formData.specialization,\n        previous_institute: formData.previous_institute,\n        teacher_type: formData.teacher_type,\n        joining_date: formData.joining_date,\n        status: formData.status,\n        notes: formData.internal_notes,\n        subject_code: formData.subjects.join(', '),\n        metadata: {\n          address: formData.address,\n          branch: formData.branch,\n          time_slots: formData.time_slots,\n          salary_type: formData.salary_type,\n          base_salary: parseFloat(formData.base_salary) || 0,\n          subjects: formData.subjects // Store array in metadata for easier retrieval\n        }\n      };\n\n      updateMutation.mutate({ id, data: profileData }, {\n        onSuccess: (res) => {\n          if (res.success) navigate(`/admin/teachers/${id}`);\n          else setError(res.message || 'Failed to update profile.');\n        },\n        onError: (err) => setError(err.message)\n      });\n    } else {\n      // New payload format mapped to staff_onboard_teacher API\n      const requestPayload = {\n        full_name: formData.full_name,\n        mobile_number: formData.mobile_number,\n        email: formData.email || null,\n        experience_years: parseInt(formData.experience_years, 10) || 0,\n        qualification: formData.qualification,\n        teacher_type: formData.teacher_type,\n        joining_date: formData.joining_date,\n        status: formData.status,\n        subjects: formData.subjects,\n        userData: formData.createLogin ? {\n          username: formData.username || formData.full_name.toLowerCase().replace(/\\s+/g, '_'),\n          password: formData.password\n        } : undefined,\n        salary_config: {\n          salary_type: formData.salary_type.toLowerCase(),\n          base_amount: parseFloat(formData.base_salary) || 0,\n          effective_from: formData.joining_date\n        },\n        documents: formData.profile_photo_url ? [\n          {\n            document_type: \"id_proof\", \n            file_url: formData.profile_photo_url\n          }\n        ] : []\n      };\n\n      addMutation.mutate(requestPayload, {\n        onSuccess: (res) => {\n          if (res.success) {\n            navigate('/admin/teachers');\n          } else {\n            // Handle new field-level ValidationError\n            const err = res.error;\n            if (err?.type === 'ValidationError' && err.details?.fields) {\n              const errorsMap = {};\n              err.details.fields.forEach((item) => {\n                errorsMap[item.field] = item.message;\n              });\n              setFieldErrors(errorsMap);\n              setError(err.message || 'Please fix the errors highlighted below.');\n            } else {\n              setError(res.message || err?.message || 'Failed to register faculty.');\n            }\n          }\n        },\n        onError: (err) => setError(err.message)\n      });\n    }\n  };\n  const handleCoursesSelect = (selectedObjects) => {\n    const identifiers = selectedObjects.map(c => c.course_id);\n    handleChange('subjects', identifiers);\n  };\n\n  if (isEditMode && isFetchingTeacher) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center min-h-[400px]\">\n        <div className=\"size-12 border-4 border-primary/30 border-t-primary rounded-full animate-spin\"></div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"pb-32\">\n      <CourseSelectionModal \n        isOpen={isCourseModalOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsCourseModalOpen(false)}\n        onSelect={handleCoursesSelect}\n        selectedCourses={selectedCourseObjects}\n        availableCourses={coursesData || []}\n      />\n      {/* Top Header Section */}\n      <header className=\"mb-8 flex justify-between items-end px-4 lg:px-0\">\n        <div>\n          <nav className=\"flex text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary mb-2 gap-2 items-center\">\n            <Link to=\"/admin\" className=\"hover:text-primary transition-colors\">Management</Link>\n            <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-[12px]\">chevron_right</span>\n            <Link to=\"/admin/teachers\" className=\"hover:text-primary transition-colors\">Teachers</Link>\n            <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-[12px]\">chevron_right</span>\n            <span className=\"text-primary font-bold\">{isEditMode ? 'Edit Profile' : 'New Registration'}</span>\n          </nav>\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-text-main dark:text-white\">\n            {isEditMode ? 'Edit Faculty Profile' : 'Teacher Registration'}\n          </h1>\n          <p className=\"text-text-secondary mt-1 font-medium text-sm\">\n            {isEditMode ? `Updating information for ${formData.full_name}` : 'Onboard a new faculty member to the Meridian ecosystem.'}\n          </p>\n        </div>\n        \n        <div className=\"hidden md:flex items-center bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm\">\n          <span className=\"text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase mr-4 tracking-widest\">\n            {isEditMode ? 'Profile Integrity' : 'Progress'}\n          </span>\n          <div className=\"w-32 h-2 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden\">\n            <div className=\"bg-primary w-3/4 h-full\"></div>\n          </div>\n          <span className=\"ml-4 text-xs font-bold text-primary\">{isEditMode ? '100%' : '25%'}</span>\n        </div>\n      </header>\n\n      {error && (\n        <div className=\"mx-4 lg:mx-0 mb-6 bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/20 text-red-600 p-4 rounded-lg border border-red-100 dark:border-red-800 flex items-center gap-3 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-2\">\n          <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined\">error</span>\n          <span className=\"text-sm font-bold\">{error}</span>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <form className=\"space-y-6 px-4 lg:px-0\" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>\n        {/* Section 1 & 2: Grid Layout */}\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6\">\n          {/* 1. Basic Information */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Basic Information\" icon=\"badge\">\n            <FormField label=\"Full Name\" name=\"full_name\" required className=\"col-span-2\" error={fieldErrors['full_name']}>\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.full_name} \n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('full_name', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"e.g. Dr. Jonathan Smith\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Mobile Number\" name=\"mobile_number\" required className=\"col-span-2\" error={fieldErrors['mobile_number']}>\n              <PhoneInput \n                value={formData.mobile_number}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('mobile_number', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"000 000 0000\"\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Email Address\" name=\"email\" error={fieldErrors['email']}>\n              <TextInput \n                type=\"email\"\n                value={formData.email}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('email', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"jonathan@meridian.com\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Gender\" name=\"gender\">\n              <SelectInput \n                value={formData.gender}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('gender', val)}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Male', value: 'male' },\n                  { label: 'Female', value: 'female' },\n                  { label: 'Other', value: 'other' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Date of Birth\" name=\"date_of_birth\">\n              <DateInput \n                value={formData.date_of_birth}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('date_of_birth', e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Residential Address\" name=\"address\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.address} \n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('address', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"Full residential address...\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Profile Photo\" name=\"avatar\">\n              <FileUpload \n                accept=\"image/*\"\n                helperText=\"Drag & drop image\"\n                onFileSelect={(file) => handleChange('profile_photo_url', file.name)}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n          </FormSection>\n\n          {/* 2. Professional Details */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Professional Details\" icon=\"history_edu\">\n            <FormField label=\"Subjects/Courses\" name=\"subjects\" className=\"col-span-2\" error={fieldErrors['subjects']}>\n              <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n                <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2 min-h-[42px] p-2 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700\">\n                  {selectedCourseObjects.length > 0 ? (\n                    selectedCourseObjects.map((course) => (\n                      <div \n                        key={course.course_id}\n                        className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 bg-primary/10 text-primary rounded-lg border border-primary/20 text-[11px] font-bold\"\n                      >\n                        {course.name}\n                        <button \n                          type=\"button\"\n                          onClick={() => handleChange('subjects', formData.subjects.filter(s => s !== course.course_id))}\n                          className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm hover:text-red-500 transition-colors\"\n                        >\n                          close\n                        </button>\n                      </div>\n                    ))\n                  ) : (\n                    <span className=\"text-xs text-slate-400 italic flex items-center px-2\">No courses selected</span>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <button\n                  type=\"button\"\n                  onClick={() => setIsCourseModalOpen(true)}\n                  className=\"w-full py-2.5 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 border-2 border-dashed border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 hover:border-primary hover:text-primary transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2\"\n                >\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-lg\">add_circle</span>\n                  Select Subjects / Courses\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Experience (Years)\" name=\"experience_years\">\n              <TextInput \n                type=\"number\"\n                value={formData.experience_years}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('experience_years', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"0\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Qualification\" name=\"qualification\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.qualification}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('qualification', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"e.g. PhD in Physics\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Specialization\" name=\"specialization\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.specialization}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('specialization', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"Quantum Mechanics\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Previous Institute\" name=\"previous_institute\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <TextInput \n                value={formData.previous_institute}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('previous_institute', e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"Metropolis Academic Center\" \n              />\n            </FormField>\n          </FormSection>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 3. Assignment & 4. Salary Configuration */}\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6\">\n          {/* 3. Assignment Details */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Assignment Details\" icon=\"assignment_ind\">\n            <FormField label=\"Assigned Branch\" name=\"branch\">\n              <SelectInput \n                value={formData.branch}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('branch', val)}\n                options={isBranchesLoading ? [{ label: 'Loading...', value: '' }] : branchOptions}\n                disabled={isBranchesLoading}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Teacher Type\" name=\"teacher_type\">\n              <SelectInput \n                value={formData.teacher_type}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('teacher_type', val)}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Full-Time', value: 'full_time' },\n                  { label: 'Part-Time', value: 'part_time' },\n                  { label: 'Guest Faculty', value: 'guest' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <FormField label=\"Joining Date\" name=\"joining_date\">\n              <DateInput \n                value={formData.joining_date}\n                onChange={(e) => handleChange('joining_date', e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </FormField>\n\n            <div className=\"col-span-2 border-t border-border-light dark:border-border-dark pt-4 mt-2\">\n              <SegmentedControl \n                label=\"Preferred Time Slot\"\n                value={Array.isArray(formData.time_slots) ? formData.time_slots[0] : formData.time_slots}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('time_slots', [val])}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Morning', value: 'Morning', icon: 'wb_sunny' },\n                  { label: 'Afternoon', value: 'Afternoon', icon: 'light_mode' },\n                  { label: 'Evening', value: 'Evening', icon: 'dark_mode' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </div>\n          </FormSection>\n\n          {/* 4. Salary Configuration */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Salary Configuration\" icon=\"payments\">\n            <RadioGroup \n              label=\"Salary Type\"\n              name=\"salary_type\"\n              className=\"col-span-2\"\n              value={formData.salary_type}\n              onChange={(val) => handleChange('salary_type', val)}\n              options={[\n                { label: 'Monthly', value: 'Monthly', icon: 'calendar_month' },\n                { label: 'Per Class', value: 'Per Class', icon: 'school' }\n              ]}\n            />\n\n            <FormField label=\"Base Salary / Rate ($)\" name=\"base_salary\" className=\"col-span-2\">\n              <div className=\"relative\">\n                <span className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400 font-bold\">$</span>\n                <TextInput \n                  type=\"number\"\n                  value={formData.base_salary}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleChange('base_salary', e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"pl-8\"\n                  placeholder=\"5,000\" \n                />\n              </div>\n              <p className=\"text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-2 italic\">Standard corporate deductions will be applied automatically during payroll.</p>\n            </FormField>\n          </FormSection>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 5. Documents & 6. Account Setup */}\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6\">\n          {/* 5. Documents */}\n          <FormSection title=\"Documents\" icon=\"description\">\n            <div className=\"col-span-2 flex flex-col gap-4\">\n              <div className=\"flex items-center p-4 bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                  <h4 className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-text-main dark:text-white\">ID Proof</h4>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500\">Passport, Driving License or State ID</p>\n                </div>\n                <button type=\"button\" className=\"flex items-center gap-2 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark shadow-sm text-xs font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors dark:text-white\">\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm\">upload</span>\n                  Upload\n                </button>\n              </div>\n              <div className=\"flex items-center p-4 bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                  <h4 className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-text-main dark:text-white\">Updated Resume</h4>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500\">PDF or DOCX max 5MB</p>\n                </div>\n                <button type=\"button\" className=\"flex items-center gap-2 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark shadow-sm text-xs font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors dark:text-white\">\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm\">upload</span>\n                  Upload\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </FormSection>\n\n          {/* 6. Account Setup */}\n          <FormSection \n            title=\"Account Setup\" \n            icon=\"lock_open\"\n            headerAction={\n              <ToggleSwitch \n                label=\"Create Login\" \n                checked={formData.createLogin}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('createLogin', val)}\n                disabled={isEditMode}\n              />\n            }\n          >\n            <div className={`col-span-2 grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 transition-all duration-300 ${formData.createLogin || isEditMode ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-30 pointer-events-none'}`}>\n              <FormField label=\"Username\" name=\"username\" className=\"col-span-2\" error={fieldErrors['userData.username']}>\n                <TextInput \n                  value={formData.username}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleChange('username', e.target.value)}\n                  placeholder=\"jsmith_meridian\"\n                  disabled={isEditMode}\n                />\n              </FormField>\n              \n              <FormField label={isEditMode ? \"Password (Encrypted)\" : \"Generated Password\"} name=\"password\">\n                <div className=\"flex items-center p-2.5 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark justify-between h-[42px]\">\n                  <span className=\"text-sm font-mono text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400\">\n                    {isEditMode ? '••••••••' : formData.password}\n                  </span>\n                  {!isEditMode && (\n                    <button \n                      type=\"button\" \n                      onClick={() => handleChange('password', generatePassword())}\n                      className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-lg hover:rotate-180 transition-transform duration-300\"\n                    >\n                      refresh\n                    </button>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n              </FormField>\n\n              <FormField label=\"System Role\" name=\"role\">\n                <div className=\"h-[42px] bg-primary/5 rounded-lg border border-primary/20 text-sm font-semibold text-primary flex items-center justify-center gap-2\">\n                  <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-sm\">verified_user</span>\n                  Teacher\n                </div>\n              </FormField>\n            </div>\n          </FormSection>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 7. Status & Notes */}\n        <FormSection title=\"Status & Internal Notes\" icon=\"notes\">\n          <div className=\"col-span-3 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6\">\n            <div className=\"md:col-span-1\">\n              <RadioGroup \n                label=\"Onboarding Status\"\n                name=\"status\"\n                layout=\"list\"\n                value={formData.status}\n                onChange={(val) => handleChange('status', val)}\n                options={[\n                  { label: 'Active', value: 'active' },\n                  { label: 'Inactive', value: 'inactive' },\n                  { label: 'Pending', value: 'pending' }\n                ]}\n              />\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"md:col-span-2\">\n              <FormField label=\"Internal Notes\" name=\"internal_notes\">\n                <textarea \n                  name=\"internal_notes\"\n                  value={formData.internal_notes}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleChange('internal_notes', e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary text-sm p-3 outline-none min-h-[160px] resize-none dark:text-white transition-all\"\n                  placeholder=\"Add any background checks, interview feedback, or special requests here...\"\n                ></textarea>\n              </FormField>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </FormSection>\n      </form>\n\n      {/* Sticky Bottom Action Bar */}\n      <footer className=\"fixed bottom-0 right-0 w-full md:w-[calc(100%-16rem)] border-t z-50 bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-lg px-8 py-4 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4\">\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => navigate(isEditMode ? `/admin/teachers/${id}` : '/admin/teachers')}\n            className=\"text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-900 font-medium text-sm flex items-center gap-2 transition-colors\"\n          >\n            <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-lg\">close</span>\n            {isEditMode ? 'Discard Changes' : 'Cancel Registration'}\n          </button>\n          <div className=\"hidden md:block h-4 w-[1px] bg-slate-200\"></div>\n          <p className=\"hidden md:block text-[11px] text-slate-400 font-medium italic\">Changes are not saved automatically.</p>\n        </div>\n        \n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 w-full md:w-auto\">\n          {!isEditMode && (\n            <button type=\"button\" className=\"hidden lg:block px-5 py-2.5 rounded-lg border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 transition-colors font-semibold text-sm\">\n              Save & Create Another\n            </button>\n          )}\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={handleSubmit}\n            disabled={addMutation.isPending || updateMutation.isPending}\n            className=\"flex-1 md:flex-none px-8 py-2.5 rounded-lg bg-primary text-white hover:bg-blue-700 transition-all font-bold text-sm shadow-md shadow-primary/20 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 active:scale-95 disabled:opacity-70\"\n          >\n            {addMutation.isPending || updateMutation.isPending ? 'Saving...' : isEditMode ? 'Update Profile' : 'Complete Registration'}\n            <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-lg\">arrow_forward</span>\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </footer>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nexport default AddTeacher;"
  },
  "id": "synth_59f6698b-2493-47dc-bc2e-b018462a8fff_1779042773067_13"
}
```

## MODEL ✨

I have completed the implementation based on the `staff_onboard_teacher_api_doc.md` specification!

Here is a summary of the operations performed:

1.  **API Hook Refactored:** `useCreateTeacherMutation` in `useTeacherQueries.js` was updated to seamlessly pass the unified payload block through to the `STAFF.ONBOARD_TEACHER` registry endpoint.
2.  **Payload Restructured:** The `handleSubmit` method in `AddTeacher.jsx` was completely rewritten for the "create" path. It now dynamically bundles core fields, `userData`, `salary_config`, `subjects`, and `documents` into the exact nested JSON schema expected by the backend transaction.
3.  **Field-Level Error Mapping:** I implemented a dynamic `fieldErrors` state. The component now intercepts the array of failures inside `err.details.fields` (e.g., duplicate mobile numbers, taken usernames) and routes them directly to the `error` props of the `FormField` components, triggering the red inline validation banners precisely where the user needs them.

The Teacher Registration flow is now fully aligned with the strict, atomic onboarding API. What would you like to tackle next?

    "output": "import React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';\nimport { useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query';\nimport { useAuth } from '../../context/AuthContextCore';\nimport { useTeachersQuery, useDeleteTeacherMutation } from '../../features/teacher/hooks/useTeacherQueries';\nimport { useFilteredTeachers } from '../../hooks/useFilteredTeachers';\nimport DataTable from '../../components/ui/DataTable';\nimport { SearchInput, SelectFilter } from '../../components/ui/filters';\nimport { createTeacherColumns } from './schemas/teacherSchema';\nimport ConfirmModal from '../../components/ui/ConfirmModal';\nimport RefreshButton from '../../components/ui/btn/RefreshButton';\n\nconst Teachers = () => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n  const queryClient = useQueryClient();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  \n  // Modal State\n  const [deleteModal, setDeleteModal] = useState({ \n    isOpen: false, \n    id: null, \n    name: '',\n    status: 'idle',\n    resultMessage: null\n  });\n\n  // 1. Fetch raw data from mock API\n  const { data: teachers = [], isLoading, isFetching, error } = useTeachersQuery();\n  const deleteMutation = useDeleteTeacherMutation();\n\n  // 2. Pass raw data to filtering hook\n  const {\n    searchQuery,\n    setSearchQuery,\n    departmentFilter,\n    setDepartmentFilter,\n    filteredTeachers,\n    availableDepartments\n  } = useFilteredTeachers(teachers);\n\n  // 4. Define handlers for the schema\n  const handlers = {\n    onView: (teacher) => navigate(`/admin/teachers/${teacher.teacher_id}`),\n    onEdit: (teacher) => navigate(`/admin/teachers/edit/${teacher.teacher_id}`),\n    onDelete: (id, name) => {\n      setDeleteModal({ \n        isOpen: true, \n        id, \n        name,\n        status: 'idle',\n        resultMessage: null\n      });\n    },\n    isDeleting: deleteMutation.isPending,\n  };\n\n  // 5. Generate columns dynamically\n  const columns = createTeacherColumns(handlers);\n\n  // 6. Define reusable filters\n  const filters = (\n    <>\n      <div className=\"md:col-span-6 lg:col-span-4 relative\">\n        <SearchInput \n          value={searchQuery}\n          onChange={setSearchQuery}\n          placeholder=\"Search by name, ID, or department\"\n        />\n      </div>\n      <div className=\"md:col-span-6 lg:col-span-8 flex flex-wrap gap-3 items-center\">\n        <SelectFilter \n          value={departmentFilter}\n          onChange={setDepartmentFilter}\n          options={availableDepartments}\n          defaultLabel=\"Department: All\"\n        />\n        <button className=\"ml-auto text-primary text-sm font-medium flex items-center gap-1 hover:underline\">\n          <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-lg\">filter_list</span>\n          More Filters\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    </>\n  );\n\n  const handleCloseModal = () => {\n    setDeleteModal({ isOpen: false, id: null, name: '', status: 'idle', resultMessage: null });\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <>\n      <DataTable \n        title=\"Faculty Directory\"\n        subtitle=\"Manage teacher profiles and department assignments\"\n        columns={columns}\n        data={filteredTeachers}\n        isLoading={isLoading}\n        error={error}\n        onRetry={() => queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['teachers'] })}\n        emptyMessage=\"No faculty members found matching your filters.\"\n        filters={filters}\n        primaryAction={\n          <Link to=\"/admin/teachers/add\" className=\"flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-primary-dark transition-colors\">\n            <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-lg\">add</span>\n            Add Faculty\n          </Link>\n        }\n        secondaryAction={\n          <>\n            <RefreshButton \n              isFetching={isFetching} \n              onRefresh={() => queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['teachers'] })} \n            />\n            <button className=\"flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-text-main dark:text-white hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition-colors\">\n              <span className=\"material-symbols-outlined text-lg\">download</span>\n              Export\n            </button>\n          </>\n        }\n      />\n      \n      <ConfirmModal \n        isOpen={deleteModal.isOpen}\n        onClose={handleCloseModal}\n        onConfirm={() => {\n          setDeleteModal(prev => ({ ...prev, status: 'processing' }));\n          deleteMutation.mutate({ id: deleteModal.id });\n        }}\n        status={deleteModal.status}\n        resultMessage={deleteModal.resultMessage}\n        title=\"Delete Faculty\"\n        message={`Are you sure you want to permanently delete ${deleteModal.name}? This action cannot be undone.`}\n      />\n    </>\n  );\n};\n\nexport default Teachers;\n"
  },

    "output": "import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';\nimport { useDebounce } from 'use-debounce';\n\n/**\n * Custom hook to manage client-side filtering for teachers\n * @param {Array} initialTeachers - The raw array of teachers from the server\n */\nexport const useFilteredTeachers = (initialTeachers = []) => {\n  // UI State for filters\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n  const [departmentFilter, setDepartmentFilter] = useState('All');\n\n  // Debounce the search query by 300ms\n  const [debouncedSearchQuery] = useDebounce(searchQuery, 300);\n\n  // Derived state: The filtered list\n  const filteredTeachers = useMemo(() => {\n    return initialTeachers.filter((teacher) => {\n      // 1. Search Filter (matches name, email, employee_id, or id)\n      const searchLower = debouncedSearchQuery.toLowerCase();\n      const matchesSearch = \n        !debouncedSearchQuery || \n        teacher.name?.toLowerCase().includes(searchLower) ||\n        teacher.email?.toLowerCase().includes(searchLower) ||\n        teacher.employee_id?.toLowerCase().includes(searchLower) ||\n        teacher.id?.toLowerCase().includes(searchLower);\n\n      // 2. Department Filter\n      const teacherDepartment = teacher.department || teacher.subject_code; // Handle schema variations\n      const matchesDepartment = departmentFilter === 'All' || teacherDepartment === departmentFilter;\n\n      return matchesSearch && matchesDepartment;\n    });\n  }, [initialTeachers, debouncedSearchQuery, departmentFilter]);\n\n  // Extract unique options for dropdowns dynamically\n  const availableDepartments = useMemo(() => {\n    const departments = new Set(initialTeachers.map(t => t.department || t.subject_code).filter(Boolean));\n    return ['All', ...Array.from(departments).sort()];\n  }, [initialTeachers]);\n\n  return {\n    searchQuery,\n    setSearchQuery,\n    departmentFilter,\n    setDepartmentFilter,\n    filteredTeachers,\n    availableDepartments\n  };\n};\n"
  },
  "id": "synth_59f6698b-2493-47dc-bc2e-b018462a8fff_1779043768181_20"
}
```

2.  **Filtering Logic Refined:**
    *   Updated `useFilteredTeachers.js` to search against `full_name`, `email`, and `teacher_id` instead of legacy fields.
    *   Corrected the department filter to use `specialization` or `subject_code`, ensuring the dropdown options and filtering results are accurate.

I'm examining the `Teachers.jsx` file to confirm that the raw data is fetched directly, bypassing any initial filtering at the `init_erp` or page-level retrieval stages.**Refining Teacher Data Fetching** I'm currently re-evaluating the initial data retrieval for teachers. It appears the `useTeachersQuery` hook might be unintentionally applying a default filter (`EMPTY_FILTER`), likely intended for active records, which I need to adjust to ensure all raw teacher data is accessible from the start.**Tool Command**:

**Tool Response**:
```json
{
  "name": "read_file",
  "response": {
    "output": "import { useQuery, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query';\nimport { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContextCore';\nimport { apiClient } from '../services/apiClient';\nimport { API_REGISTRY } from '../services/apiRegistry';\nimport { queryKeys, EMPTY_FILTER } from '../lib/react-query/queryKeys';\n\n/**\n * useErpHydration: Strategy 1 - App Initialization Guard\n * Fetches initial ERP data and populates the React Query cache.\n */\nexport const useErpHydration = () => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n  const queryClient = useQueryClient();\n\n  // 📋 Hydration Configuration Mapping: \n  // Maps API target names (singular schema names for request) \n  // to their pluralized response keys and Query Key factories.\n  const HYDRATION_CONFIG = {\n    'Course': { query_key: queryKeys.course, response_key: 'courses' },\n    'Teacher': { query_key: queryKeys.teacher, response_key: 'teachers' },\n    'Student': { query_key: queryKeys.student, response_key: 'students' },\n    'Batch': { query_key: queryKeys.batch, response_key: 'batches' },\n    'Branch': { query_key: queryKeys.branch, response_key: 'branches' },\n  };\n\n  const HYDRATION_TARGETS = Object.keys(HYDRATION_CONFIG);\n\n  return useQuery({\n    queryKey: ['init_erp', { targets: HYDRATION_TARGETS }],\n    queryFn: async () => {\n      console.log('🚀 Starting ERP Hydration with targets:', HYDRATION_TARGETS);\n\n      const response = await apiClient.executeAction(\n        API_REGISTRY.ADMIN.INIT_ERP, \n        { targets: HYDRATION_TARGETS }, \n        token\n      );\n\n      if (!response.success) {\n        throw new Error(response.message || 'Failed to initialize ERP data');\n      }\n\n      const data = response.data || {};\n      const now = Date.now();\n\n      // 🛡️ Dynamic Cache Injection\n      HYDRATION_TARGETS.forEach(targetName => {\n        const config = HYDRATION_CONFIG[targetName];\n        if (!config) return;\n\n        const responseKey = config.response_key;\n        const result = data[responseKey];\n\n        console.log(`🔍 Inspecting hydration for ${targetName} (Response Key: ${responseKey})...`);\n\n        if (result && Array.isArray(result.data)) {\n          const records = result.data;\n          \n          console.log(`💧 Hydrating ${targetName}: ${records.length} records found.`);\n          console.log(`📦 Cache Key:`, JSON.stringify(config.query_key.list(EMPTY_FILTER)));\n\n          queryClient.setQueryData(\n            config.query_key.list(EMPTY_FILTER), \n            records, \n            { updatedAt: now }\n          );\n        } else {\n          console.warn(`⚠️ No records found in response for key: ${responseKey}. Data structure:`, result);\n        }\n      });\n\n      return data;\n    },\n    enabled: !!token,\n    staleTime: Infinity,\n    gcTime: Infinity,\n    refetchOnWindowFocus: false,\n  });\n};\n"
  },
  "id": "synth_59f6698b-2493-47dc-bc2e-b018462a8fff_1779044134376_30"
}
```

## MODEL ✨

**Investigating Filtering Logic** My current focus is on pinpointing where teacher data is being filtered. I'm exploring whether the backend GAS script, specifically during the `init_erp` action with `HYDRATION_TARGETS`, is inherently limiting results to active teachers. Simultaneously, I'm reviewing the frontend to ensure no unintended default filters are being applied there.**Clarifying Teacher Fetching** I'm digging into how teachers are fetched. The `useTeachersQuery` hook defaults to an empty filter (`{}`), which seems correct for retrieving all teachers. My next step is to confirm that the backend's `data_query` and `init_erp` actions truly honor an empty `where` clause, ensuring no implicit "active only" filtering is occurring.**Tool Command**:

  },
  "id": "synth_59f6698b-2493-47dc-bc2e-b018462a8fff_1779044149227_31"
}

{

    "output": "import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query';\nimport { useAuth } from '../../../context/AuthContextCore';\nimport { queryKeys, EMPTY_FILTER } from '../../../lib/react-query/queryKeys';\nimport { apiClient } from '../../../services/apiClient';\nimport { API_REGISTRY } from '../../../services/apiRegistry';\n\n/**\n * Hook for fetching all teachers\n */\nexport const useTeachersQuery = (filter = EMPTY_FILTER) => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n\n  return useQuery({\n    queryKey: queryKeys.teacher.list(filter),\n    queryFn: async ({ signal }) => {\n      const response = await apiClient.executeAction(\n        API_REGISTRY.DATA.QUERY, \n        { target: 'Teacher', where: filter }, \n        token, \n        { signal }\n      );\n      return response.data?.data || [];\n    },\n    enabled: !!token,\n    staleTime: Infinity,\n    refetchOnMount: false,\n    refetchOnWindowFocus: false,\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Hook for fetching a single teacher detail\n */\nexport const useTeacherDetailQuery = (id) => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n  const queryClient = useQueryClient();\n\n  return useQuery({\n    queryKey: queryKeys.teacher.detail(id),\n    queryFn: async ({ signal }) => {\n      const response = await apiClient.executeAction(\n        API_REGISTRY.DATA.QUERY, \n        { \n          target: 'Teacher', \n          where: { teacher_id: id }, \n          pagination: { limit: 1 } \n        }, \n        token, \n        { signal }\n      );\n      return response.data?.data?.[0] || null;\n    },\n    enabled: !!token && !!id,\n    initialData: () => {\n      if (!id) return undefined;\n      const cachedDetail = queryClient.getQueryData(queryKeys.teacher.detail(id));\n      if (cachedDetail) return cachedDetail;\n\n      const listQueries = queryClient.getQueriesData({ queryKey: queryKeys.teacher.lists() });\n      for (const [key, listData] of listQueries) {\n        if (Array.isArray(listData)) {\n          const item = listData.find(t => t.teacher_id === id || t.id === id);\n          if (item) return item;\n        }\n      }\n      return undefined;\n    },\n    initialDataUpdatedAt: () => queryClient.getQueryState(queryKeys.teacher.detail(id))?.dataUpdatedAt,\n    staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Hook for fetching teacher attendance\n */\nexport const useTeacherAttendanceQuery = (teacherId) => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n\n  return useQuery({\n    queryKey: [...queryKeys.teacher.detail(teacherId), 'attendance'],\n    queryFn: async ({ signal }) => {\n      const response = await apiClient.executeAction(\n        API_REGISTRY.DATA.QUERY,\n        { target: 'TeacherAttendance', where: { teacher_id: teacherId } },\n        token,\n        { signal }\n      );\n      return response.data?.data || [];\n    },\n    enabled: !!token && !!teacherId,\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Hook for updating teacher attendance\n */\nexport const useUpdateTeacherAttendanceMutation = () => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n  const queryClient = useQueryClient();\n\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: ({ teacherId, date, data, options }) => \n      apiClient.executeAction(\n        API_REGISTRY.STAFF.MARK_ATTENDANCE, \n        { teacherId, date, ...data }, \n        token, \n        options\n      ),\n    onSuccess: (response, { teacherId }) => {\n      if (response.success) {\n        queryClient.refetchQueries({ queryKey: [...queryKeys.teacher.detail(teacherId), 'attendance'] });\n      }\n    }\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Hook for creating a new teacher\n */\nexport const useCreateTeacherMutation = () => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n  const queryClient = useQueryClient();\n\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (payload) => \n      apiClient.executeAction(\n        API_REGISTRY.STAFF.ONBOARD_TEACHER, \n        payload, \n        token\n      ),\n    onSuccess: (response) => {\n      if (response.success) {\n        queryClient.refetchQueries({ queryKey: queryKeys.teacher.all });\n      }\n    }\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Hook for updating a teacher\n */\nexport const useUpdateTeacherMutation = () => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n  const queryClient = useQueryClient();\n\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: ({ id, data, options }) => \n      apiClient.executeAction(\n        API_REGISTRY.DATA.UPDATE, \n        { target: 'Teacher', where: { teacher_id: id }, data }, \n        token, \n        options\n      ),\n    onSuccess: (response, { id }) => {\n      if (response.success) {\n        queryClient.refetchQueries({ queryKey: queryKeys.teacher.all });\n        queryClient.refetchQueries({ queryKey: queryKeys.teacher.detail(id) });\n      }\n    }\n  });\n};\n\n/**\n * Hook for deleting a teacher\n */\nexport const useDeleteTeacherMutation = () => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n  const queryClient = useQueryClient();\n\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: ({ id, options }) => \n      apiClient.executeAction(\n        API_REGISTRY.DATA.DELETE, \n        { target: 'Teacher', where: { teacher_id: id } }, \n        token, \n        options\n      ),\n    onSuccess: (response) => {\n      if (response.success) {\n        queryClient.refetchQueries({ queryKey: queryKeys.teacher.all });\n      }\n    }\n  });\n};\n"
  },

## MODEL ✨

**Validating Query Logic** I'm verifying that our queries aren't inadvertently filtering data on the backend. My focus is on pinpointing if `init_erp` or `data_query` are exclusively returning active records, or if the client-side `useFilteredTeachers` hook is the culprit for unexpected filtering.**Examining Client-Side Filters** I've double-checked `useFilteredTeachers.js`. This hook's filtering logic seems to only activate based on explicit user input from search and department dropdowns. With default filter states, it should pass through all `initialTeachers` without modification.**Investigating Init Erp Logic** I'm checking if the backend's `init_erp` function might be filtering data. While I found hardcoded active status in `fetchCourses`, `useTeachersQuery` doesn't show this. My next step is to examine `useErpHydration.js` and the `init_erp` Gas script implementation.**Confirming Backend Data Integrity** I'm now examining the backend's `init_erp` implementation more closely. My goal is to confirm that no backend logic, specifically within the GAS script, is inadvertently filtering the `Teacher` data before it reaches the client. I'll then investigate any other potential client-side filtering mechanisms beyond the `useFilteredTeachers` hook.**Tool Command**:
```json

  "args": {

}

{
  "name": "read_file",
  "response": {
    "output": "import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';\nimport { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContextCore';\nimport { query } from '../services/api';\n\n/**\n * Custom hook to manage teacher data fetching using React Query\n */\nexport const useTeachers = (filter = {}) => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n\n  return useQuery({\n    queryKey: ['teachers', filter],\n    queryFn: async () => {\n      const response = await query(token, 'Teacher', filter);\n      if (!response.success) {\n        throw new Error(response.error?.message || response.message || 'Failed to fetch teachers');\n      }\n      // Based on API reference: data.data contains the actual array\n      return response.data?.data || [];\n    },\n    enabled: !!token,\n  });\n};\n"
  },
  "id": "synth_59f6698b-2493-47dc-bc2e-b018462a8fff_1779044208443_34"
}

{

axios.create({\n  baseURL: API_URL,\n  headers: {\n    'Content-Type': 'text/plain;charset=utf-8',\n  },\n});\n\n/**\n * Common handler for Google Script POST requests\n * Supports AbortController signal via options\n */\nexport const postToGoogleScript = async (data, options = {}) => {\n  try {\n    const response = await axios.post(API_URL, JSON.stringify(data), {\n      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain;charset=utf-8' },\n      signal: options.signal\n    });\n    \n    // Log logic errors from the server (GAS returns 200 even on failures)\n    if (response.data && response.data.success === false) {\n      console.error('API Logic Error:', response.data);\n    }\n    \n    return response.data;\n  } catch (error) {\n    if (axios.isCancel(error)) {\n      console.log('Request canceled:', error.message);\n    } else {\n      console.error('API Network/System Error:', error);\n    }\n    throw error;\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Helper to create admin payloads with token\n */\nconst createAdminPayload = (action, token, extraData = {}) => ({\n  action,\n  token,\n  ...extraData\n});\n\n// Generic Retrieval Actions (ORM Query Engine)\nexport const query = (token, entity, filter = {}, options = {}) => \n  postToGoogleScript(createAdminPayload('query', token, { entity, filter }), options);\n\nexport const retrieve = (token, entity, id, options = {}) => \n  postToGoogleScript(createAdminPayload('retrieve', token, { entity, id }), options);\n\n// Student CRUD\nexport const addStudent = (token, userData, profileData, options = {}) => \n  postToGoogleScript(createAdminPayload('addstudent', token, { userData, profileData }), options);\n\nexport const updateStudent = (token, id, data, options = {}) => \n  postToGoogleScript(createAdminPayload('updatestudent', token, { id, data }), options);\n\nexport const deleteStudent = (token, id, options = {}) => \n  postToGoogleScript(createAdminPayload('deletestudent', token, { id }), options);\n\n// Teacher CRUD\nexport const addTeacher = (token, userData, profileData, options = {}) => \n  postToGoogleScript(createAdminPayload('addteacher', token, { userData, profileData }), options);\n\nexport const updateTeacher = (token, id, data, options = {}) => \n  postToGoogleScript(createAdminPayload('updateteacher', token, { id, data }), options);\n\nexport const deleteTeacher = (token, id, options = {}) => \n  postToGoogleScript(createAdminPayload('deleteteacher', token, { id }), options);\n\nexport default api;\n"
